# 元语言函数示例_历史计划库

- 分组：元语言函数说明
- 原始章节名：元语言函数示例_历史计划库
- 内容块数量：244
- 来源：WOS4 帮助手册 static/js/file.js

## 正文

# 1. 元语言函数示例

# 1. 元语言函数示例

# 1.1. 时空对象

## 1.1. 时空对象

# 1.1.1. Create

### 1.1.1. Create

# 1.1.1.1. 创建全新时空对象

//示例_创建全新时空对象（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

dataFields = {"$parentGUID","$name","$label1","$displayName"};

//////////////在根下创建时空////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"","集团1","lay1","group1"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"","集团2","lay1","group2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

///////////////在时空下创建时空//////////////////
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","时空1","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","时空2","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

#### 1.1.1.1. 创建全新时空对象

 //示例_创建全新时空对象（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

dataFields = {"$parentGUID","$name","$label1","$displayName"};

//////////////在根下创建时空////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"","集团1","lay1","group1"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"","集团2","lay1","group2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

///////////////在时空下创建时空//////////////////
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","时空1","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","时空2","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.1.1.2. 创建指定ID、GUID的时空对象

//示例_创建指定ID、GUID的时空对象（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

dataFields = {"$parentGUID","$name","$id","$guid","$label1","$displayName"};

//////////////在根下创建时空////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"","集团1",(uint64)18158513697557839881,"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","lay1","group1"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"","集团2",(uint64)18158513697557839882,"b544c252-bc93-4151-a69f-4b87f64ba360","lay1","group2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

///////////////在时空下创建时空//////////////////
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","集团1工厂1",(uint64)18158513697557839883,"69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","集团1工厂2",(uint64)18158513697557839884,"c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

#### 1.1.1.2. 创建指定ID、GUID的时空对象

 //示例_创建指定ID、GUID的时空对象（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

dataFields = {"$parentGUID","$name","$id","$guid","$label1","$displayName"};

//////////////在根下创建时空////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"","集团1",(uint64)18158513697557839881,"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","lay1","group1"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"","集团2",(uint64)18158513697557839882,"b544c252-bc93-4151-a69f-4b87f64ba360","lay1","group2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

///////////////在时空下创建时空//////////////////
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","集团1工厂1",(uint64)18158513697557839883,"69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56","集团1工厂2",(uint64)18158513697557839884,"c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087","lay2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.1.2. Delete

### 1.1.2. Delete

# 1.1.2.1. 删除指定对象（mode = 13（缺省））

//示例_删除指定对象，Delete_mode = 13（缺省）（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL; //删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象Name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj2","obj3"};
condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_TREE;//删除模式，删自己+后代，2;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象别名////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL;//删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL;//删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.1.2.1. 删除指定对象（mode = 13（缺省））

 //示例_删除指定对象，Delete_mode = 13（缺省）（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL; //删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象Name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj2","obj3"};
condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_TREE;//删除模式，删自己+后代，2;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象别名////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL;//删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
//condition1.dealMode = (int32)Enum_DealMode::DELETE_FAIL;//删除模式，有后代则删除失败，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.1.3. Update

### 1.1.3. Update

# 1.1.3.1. 修改指定对象（mode = 13（缺省））

//示例_修改指定对象，Update_mode = 13（缺省）（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701

//////////////指定对象ID////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"obj11",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"obj12","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)2882303761546718456};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name","$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象Name////////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"obj22"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"obj33"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1/obj2/","obj1/obj3/"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象别名///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.1.3.1. 修改指定对象（mode = 13（缺省））

 //示例_修改指定对象，Update_mode = 13（缺省）（运行库只在非部署类型数据区下支持）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701

//////////////指定对象ID////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"obj11",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"obj12","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)2882303761546718456};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name","$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象Name////////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"obj22"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"obj33"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1/obj2/","obj1/obj3/"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象别名///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$parentGUID"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.1.4. Query

### 1.1.4. Query

# 1.1.4.1. 查询符合条件的对象（mode = 11）

//示例_查询符合条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$label1","$label2","$label3","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$timeSpan"};

//////////////查所有////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name==\"obj1\"";
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"obj\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询符合条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$label1","$label2","$label3","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$timeSpan"};

//////////////查所有////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name==\"obj1\"";
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"obj\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

uint64[] ids;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::SPACETIME;//对象类型，3701、4701;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$label1","$label2","$label3","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$timeSpan"};

//////////////指定对象ID[]查指定时空////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.queryMode = (int32)Enum_QueryMode::SELF;//查询模式，查本身，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"ST\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象Name[]查子时空////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.queryMode = (int32)Enum_QueryMode::CHILD;//查询模式，查子时空，2;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj2","obj3"};
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"ST\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象别名[]查本身+全部后代////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.queryMode = (int32)Enum_QueryMode::TREE;//查询模式，查本身+后代，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"ST\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象GUID[]查本身+全部后代////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.queryMode = (int32)Enum_QueryMode::TREE;//查询模式，查本身+后代，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};//""：系统根时空
//condition1.filter = "$name include \"ST\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询指定对象（的子对象、对象树），Query_mode = 13、省略

# 1.2. 运行仓库

## 1.2. 运行仓库

# 1.2.1. Query

### 1.2.1. Query

# 1.2.1.1. 查询符合条件的运行仓库（mode = 210）

//示例_查询符合条件的运行仓库，Query_mode = 210
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string guid;
string[] guids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::REPO;//对象类型，3702，4702;

returnFields = {"$guid","$name","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID"};

//////////////1在App部署时空里查////////////////////

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2在指定时空里查////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;

condition1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3在数据区里查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询符合条件的运行仓库，Query_mode = 210
////////////////////////////////

Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string guid;
string[] guids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::REPO;//对象类型，3702，4702;

returnFields = {"$guid","$name","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID"};

//////////////1在App部署时空里查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2在指定时空里查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3在数据区里查////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 guid = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$guid");
 guids.push(guid);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;

# 1.2.1.2. 查询指定的运行仓库（mode = 211）

//示例_查询指定运行仓库，Query_mode = 211
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string guid;
string[] guids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::REPO;//对象类型，3702，4702;

returnFields = {"$guid","$name","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID"};

//////////////1在App部署时空里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2在指定时空里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3在数据区里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询指定运行仓库，Query_mode = 211
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string guid;
string[] guids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::REPO;//对象类型，3702，4702;

returnFields = {"$guid","$name","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID"};

//////////////1在App部署时空里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2在指定时空里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3在数据区里，指定仓库GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.packetVersions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 guid = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$guid");
 guids.push(guid);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.3. 运行模型、拷贝

## 1.3. 运行模型、拷贝

# 1.3.1. Create

### 1.3.1. Create

# 1.3.1.1. 同步从模型库导入模型、拷贝

//示例_同步从模型库导入模型、拷贝
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,dataInfo1;
Result result1;
stringMap [] dataInfos;
////////////////////////////////
stringMap errorMessage;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

//////////////导入模型、拷贝到根时空////////////////////
dataInfo1.spaceTimeGUID = "";
dataInfo1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataInfo1.versions = {3,1}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
dataInfos.push(new dataInfo1);

///////////////导入模型、拷贝到指定时空//////////////////
dataInfo1.spaceTimeGUID = "ab8f075d-5d37-4c25-b787-e40878d1cb3c";
dataInfo1.guids = {"5d7fd2f5-1bd7-40d7-a889-799db6b159da","802cbede-82ec-49e4-bade-5aa42001afa3"};
dataInfo1.versions = {2,2}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
dataInfos.push(new dataInfo1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_ImportCmdCode::BY_DATA_INFO;//导入命令码，从模型库导入，1;
input.importMode = (int32)Enum_ImportMode::FAIL;//GUID已存在的导入处理模式，1;
input.areaID = 0; //模型库数据区，省略、0：默认数据区
input.dataInfos = new dataInfos;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorMessage = output.errorMessage;
 //Trace(2, "errorMessage=", errorMessage);
}

#### 1.3.1.1. 同步从模型库导入模型、拷贝

 //示例_同步从模型库导入模型、拷贝
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,dataInfo1;
Result result1;
stringMap<var>[] dataInfos;
////////////////////////////////
stringMap<Var> errorMessage;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

//////////////导入模型、拷贝到根时空////////////////////
dataInfo1.spaceTimeGUID = "";
dataInfo1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataInfo1.versions = {3,1}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
dataInfos.push(new dataInfo1);

///////////////导入模型、拷贝到指定时空//////////////////
dataInfo1.spaceTimeGUID = "ab8f075d-5d37-4c25-b787-e40878d1cb3c";
dataInfo1.guids = {"5d7fd2f5-1bd7-40d7-a889-799db6b159da","802cbede-82ec-49e4-bade-5aa42001afa3"};
dataInfo1.versions = {2,2}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
dataInfos.push(new dataInfo1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_ImportCmdCode::BY_DATA_INFO;//导入命令码，从模型库导入，1;
input.importMode = (int32)Enum_ImportMode::FAIL;//GUID已存在的导入处理模式，1;
input.areaID = 0; //模型库数据区，省略、0：默认数据区
input.dataInfos = new dataInfos;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorMessage = output.errorMessage;
 //Trace(2, "errorMessage=", errorMessage);
}
 

# 1.3.2. Delete

### 1.3.2. Delete

# 1.3.2.1. 删除指定模型、拷贝

//示例_删除指定模型、拷贝，Delete_mode = 211、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

////////////////指定模型、拷贝ID////////////////
//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODELS_COPYS_REPO;//查找模式，211;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型、拷贝标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
condition1.versions = {3,1}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定模型、拷贝GUID/////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODELS_COPYS_REPO;//查找模式，211;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型、拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.versions = {3,1}; //type = 模型时，参数有效
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.3.3. Query

### 1.3.3. Query

# 1.3.3.1. 查询符合条件的运行模型版本、拷贝（mode = 210）

#### 1.3.3.1. 查询符合条件的运行模型版本、拷贝（mode = 210）

# 1.3.3.1.1. 查询符合条件的模型

//示例_查询符合条件的模型，Query_mode = 210
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

returnFields = {"$id","$name","$guid","$version","$repoGUID","$memberList"};

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////1.2在App部署时空/系统仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////1.3在App部署时空/指定仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2.1在指定时空/App仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2.2在指定时空/系统仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2.3在指定时空/指定仓库里查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3.1在数据区/App仓库里查////////////////////

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

//指定仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";

conditions.push(new condition1);

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

////////////////////////////////

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。

//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

returnFields = {"$id","$name","$guid","$version","$repoGUID","$memberList"};

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

}
 

# 1.3.3.1.2. 查询符合条件的拷贝

//示例_查询符合条件的拷贝，Query_mode = 210
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

returnFields = {"$id","$name","$guid","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$repoGUID","$memberList"};

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里按模型版本过滤查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.modelVersions = {2,3};//type=copy时，参数有效。选填：按模型版本过滤查拷贝
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////3.3在数据区/指定仓库里按模型版本过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::FILTER;//查找模式，210;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

//指定仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";
condition1.modelGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};//type=copy时，参数有效。选填：按模型过滤查拷贝
condition1.modelVersions = {2,3};//type=copy时，参数有效。选填：按模型版本过滤查拷贝
condition1.returnFields =new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);
//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.3.3.2. 查询指定的运行模型版本、拷贝（mode = 211）

#### 1.3.3.2. 查询指定的运行模型版本、拷贝（mode = 211）

# 1.3.3.2.1. 查询指定模型

//示例_查询指定模型，Query_mode = 211
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里，指定模型ID[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库

condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.versions = {1,3};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

# 1.3.3.2.2. 查询指定拷贝

//示例_查询指定拷贝，Query_mode = 211

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

 //示例_查询指定拷贝，Query_mode = 211
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;

uint64[] ids;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//模型类型，3901~3907、3911，4901、4904~4906、4911;
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_COPY;//拷贝类型，3801~3808，4801、4804~4806、4808;

returnFields = {"$id","$name","$guid","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$repoGUID","$memberList"};

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里，指定拷贝ID[]查////////////////////

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库

condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

conditions.push(new condition1);

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库

condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////1.3在App部署时空/指定仓库里，指定拷贝ID[]查////////////////////

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::IDENTIFY;//查找模式，211;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

//指定仓库

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.4. 资源对象

## 1.4. 资源对象

# 1.4.1. Create

### 1.4.1. Create

# 1.4.1.1. 新建

#### 1.4.1.1. 新建

# 1.4.1.1.1. 创建资源对象_blob

//示例_创建资源对象_blob
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
string strblob;
JSONObject jsObj;
blob blobData1,blobData2;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

dataFields = {"$name","$blobFormat","$data"};
blobData1.appendString("hellohello");
jsObj = {
 "Control": {
 "Src_System": "YK_MES", //第三方系统
 "Dest_System": "SAP",
 "InterfaceID": "MM008", //接口编号
 "Send_Time": "20240701110450" //请求时间
 },
 "HEADS": [
 {
 "FLAG": "",
 "MATNR": "200000014663", //物料
 "WERKS": "1109", //大屯锡矿编号
 "LGORT": "" //库存地点
 }
 ]
};
strblob = ConvertToJsonString(jsObj);
blobData2.appendString(strblob);

dataValue1 = {"blob1","txt",blobData1};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"blob2","txt",blobData2};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.kind = (int32)Enum_ResourceKind::BLOB;//资源数据类型，1;
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.4.1.1.1. 创建资源对象_blob 
 //示例_创建资源对象_blob
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
string strblob;
JSONObject jsObj;
blob blobData1,blobData2;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

dataFields = {"$name","$blobFormat","$data"};
blobData1.appendString("hellohello");
jsObj = {
 "Control": {
 "Src_System": "YK_MES", //第三方系统
 "Dest_System": "SAP",
 "InterfaceID": "MM008", //接口编号
 "Send_Time": "20240701110450" //请求时间
 },
 "HEADS": [
 {
 "FLAG": "",
 "MATNR": "200000014663", //物料
 "WERKS": "1109", //大屯锡矿编号
 "LGORT": "" //库存地点
 }
 ]
};
strblob = ConvertToJsonString(jsObj);
blobData2.appendString(strblob);

dataValue1 = {"blob1","txt",blobData1};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"blob2","txt",blobData2};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.kind = (int32)Enum_ResourceKind::BLOB;//资源数据类型，1;
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

stringMap param,input,output;

var[] dataValue1;

////////////////////////////////

uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

dataFields = {"$name","$data"};
jsObj1 = {
 "Control": {
 "Src_System": "YK_MES", //第三方系统
 "Dest_System": "SAP",
 "InterfaceID": "MM008", //接口编号
 "Send_Time": "20240701110450" //请求时间
 },
 "HEADS": [
 {
 "FLAG": "",
 "MATNR": "200000014663", //物料
 "WERKS": "1109", //大屯锡矿编号
 "LGORT": "" //库存地点
 }
 ]
};

dataValue1 = {"js1",jsObj1};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"js2",jsObj2};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.kind = (int32)Enum_ResourceKind::JSON;//资源数据类型，2;
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

# 1.4.1.1.3. （待开发）创建资源对象_array

//示例_创建资源对象_array
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
int[] intArr1;
int[][] intArr2;
string[] strArr1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

dataFields = {"$name","$data","$label1","$arrayDim","$arrayValueType"};
strArr1 = {"aa","bb","cc"};
intArr1 = {1,2,3};
intArr2.push(new intArr1);
intArr1 = {10,20,30};
intArr2.push(new intArr1);

dataValue1 = {"array1",strArr1,"1维",1,13};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"array2",intArr2,"2维",2,4};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.kind = (int32)Enum_ResourceKind::ARRAY;//资源数据类型，3;
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

dataValue1 = {"table2","",tableType};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);

{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else

 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

# 1.4.1.2. 复制

//示例_复制资源对象
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

dataFields = {"$name","$displayName","$description"};//复制模式，传入$data值无效

dataValue1 = {"newblob1","blob","blob1"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"newblob2","blob","blob2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.createMode = 5： //复制模式，连同源对象的数据一并复制
input.dataFields = new dataFields;
input.dataValues = new dataValues;//新对象值[]，长度和ids[]长度要一致

//源对象在本App时空/本App仓库里
//input.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
input.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//标识类型，1;
//input.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
input.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};//源对象ID

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

# 1.4.2. Delete

### 1.4.2. Delete

# 1.4.2.1. 删除指定对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_删除指定对象，Delete_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"blob1","js1"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.4.3. Update

### 1.4.3. Update

# 1.4.3.1. 修改对象的属性（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_修改指定对象的属性，Update_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

//////////////指定对象ID////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"blob11",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"js12","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)2882303761546718456};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name","$location"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象name////////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"blob22"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"js33"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"blob2","js3"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$location"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.4.3.1. 修改对象的属性（mode = 17（缺省））

 //示例_修改指定对象的属性，Update_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////

////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

//////////////指定对象ID////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"blob11",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"js12","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)2882303761546718456};
condition1.dataFields = {"$name","$location"};

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象name////////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"blob22"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"js33"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$location"};
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.4.3.2. 修改对象的数据

#### 1.4.3.2. 修改对象的数据

# 1.4.3.2.1. 修改对象的数据_blob（mode = 91）

//示例_修改对象的数据_blob，mode = 91
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
blob blobData1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

blobData1.appendString("hellohello");

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//追加，1;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "blob1";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//追加，1;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::REPLACE;//覆盖，4;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

 1.4.3.2.1. 修改对象的数据_blob（mode = 91） 
 //示例_修改对象的数据_blob，mode = 91

stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
blob blobData1;
////////////////////////////////

////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

blobData1.appendString("hellohello");

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//追加，1;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "blob1";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//追加，1;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::REPLACE;//覆盖，4;
condition1.data = blobData1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////

//示例_修改对象的数据_json，mode = 92
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] keyPaths;
var[] keyValues; 
JSONObject jsObj1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

keyPaths = {"$.customer.email","$.customer.address"};
keyValues = {"John Doe","john.doe@example.com"};
jsObj1 = {
 "Control": {
 "Src_System": "YK_MES", //第三方系统
 "Dest_System": "SAP",
 "InterfaceID": "MM008", //接口编号
 "Send_Time": "20240701110450" //请求时间
 },
 "HEADS": [
 {
 "FLAG": "",
 "MATNR": "200000014663", //物料
 "WERKS": "1109", //大屯锡矿编号
 "LGORT": "" //库存地点
 }
 ]
};
////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_JSON;//操作模式，92;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//添加，1;
condition1.keyPaths = keyPaths;
condition1.keyValues = keyValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_JSON;//操作模式，92;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "js1";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::DELETE;//删除，2;
condition1.keyPaths = keyPaths;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_JSON;//操作模式，92;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::UPDATE;//更新，3;
condition1.keyPaths = keyPaths;
condition1.keyValues = keyValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_JSON;//操作模式，92;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::REPLACE;//整体覆盖，4;
condition1.data = jsObj1;//整体覆盖数据
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

//示例_修改对象的数据_array，mode = 93
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] strIndexs1,strIndexs2;
int[] intArray1;
var[] datas_dim1,datas_dim2;
////////////////////////////////

stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。

param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

strIndexs1 = {"$[2]","$[3]"};
strIndexs2 = {"$[1][3]","$[2][2]"};

datas_dim1 = {"aa","bb","cc"}; //一维数组

//list intList1;

//intList1.pushBack(2);
//intList1.pushBack(3);
//datas_dim2.push(new intList1);

intArray1 = {1,2,3};
datas_dim2.push(new intArray1); //二维数组
intArray1 = {4,5,6};
datas_dim2.push(new intArray1);
intArray1 = {7,8,9};
datas_dim2.push(new intArray1);

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_ARRAY;//操作模式，93;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//添加，1;
condition1.strIndexs = strIndexs1;
condition1.datas = datas_dim1; //一维数组
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象name////////////////

condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "array2";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::DELETE;//删除，2;
condition1.strIndexs = strIndexs1; 
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_ARRAY;//操作模式，93;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "array1";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::UPDATE;//更新，3;
condition1.strIndexs = strIndexs1;
condition1.datas = datas_dim1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////

condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";

condition1.datas = datas_dim1; //一维数组
