# 1.4.3.2.4. 修改对象的数据_table__设置表结构（mode = 95）

//示例_修改对象的数据_table_设置表结构，mode = 95
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
stringMap column1;
stringMap [] columns;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758

column1.name = "m10"; 
column1.valueType = 13;
column1.maxSize = 100;
column1.unique = true;
columns.push(new column1);

column1.name = "m11";
column1.valueType = 4;
column1.unique = false;
columns.push(new column1);

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_DESIGN;//操作模式，95;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::ADD;//添加，1;
condition1.columns = new columns; //在最后列后面添加列
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_DESIGN;//操作模式，95;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.name = "table1";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::DELETE;//删除，2(目前不支持);
condition1.selectColNames = {"m1","m2"};//要删除或要更新的列名
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_DESIGN;//操作模式，95;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.updateMode = (int32)Enum_ResourceUpdateMode::UPDATE;//更新，3(目前不支持);
condition1.selectColNames = {"m1","m2"};//要删除或要更新的列名
condition1.columns = new columns;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.4.3.2.5. 修改对象的数据_table__添加数据（mode = 96）

//示例_修改对象的数据_table_添加数据，mode = 96
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] colNames;
var[][] colValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

colNames = {"度量类型","度量单位","度量说明"};
colValues = {{"重量","千克",""},{"重量","吨",""},{"重量","克",""}}; 

////////////////指定对象ID////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_ADD_ROW;//操作模式，96;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671845;
condition1.colNames = new colNames;
condition1.colValues = new colValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_ADD_ROW;//操作模式，96
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）
condition1.name = "table1";
condition1.colNames = new colNames;
condition1.colValues = new colValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_ADD_ROW;//操作模式，96;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.colNames = new colNames;
condition1.colValues = new colValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

condition1.filter = "度量类型 == \"重量\" && 度量单位 == \"千克\"";
condition1.colNames = new colNames;
condition1.values = new values;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_TABLE_UPDATE_ROW;//操作模式，98;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guid = "c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d";
condition1.filter = "度量类型 == \"重量\" && 度量单位 == \"千克\"";
condition1.colNames = new colNames;
condition1.values = new values;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.4.4. Query

### 1.4.4. Query

# 1.4.4.1. 查询对象的属性

#### 1.4.4.1. 查询对象的属性

# 1.4.4.1.1. 查询多时空符合过滤条件的对象的属性（mode = 11）

//示例_查询符合过滤条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,aggregate1;
stringMap [] conditions,aggregates;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$location","$label1","$label2","$label3","$kind","$size"};

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$kind==1";//按filter过滤
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.filter = "$label1==\"lbl1\"";//按filter过滤
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$label1==\"lbl1\"";//按filter过滤
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有////////////////////

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.filter = "$label1==\"lbl1\"";//按filter过滤
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里按filter过滤查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$label1==\"lbl1\"";//按filter过滤
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$location","$label1","$label2","$label3","$kind","$size"};

# 1.4.4.1.4. 查询单时空单仓库的指定对象的属性（mode=211）

//示例_查询单时空单仓库的指定对象的属性，Query_mode = 211
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$location","$label1","$label2","$label3","$kind","$size"};

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里，指定对象ID[]查////////////////////

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.4.4.2. 查询对象的数据

#### 1.4.4.2. 查询对象的数据

# 1.4.4.2.1. 查询单时空单仓库的指定对象的数据_blob（mode = 91）

//示例_查询单时空单仓库的指定对象的数据_blob，返回数据集列头：$id、$data，Query_mode = 91
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
blob data;
blob[] datas;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里，指定对象ID查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671847;
//condition1.offset = 1; //从头开始
condition1.limit = 4000; //4000字节
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////1.2在App部署时空/系统仓库里，指定对象ID查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671847;
condition1.offset = 1; //从头开始
condition1.limit = 4000; //4000字节
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////1.3在App部署时空/指定仓库里，指定对象ID查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_BLOB;//操作模式，91;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//指定仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671847;
//condition1.offset = 1; //从头开始
condition1.limit = 4000; //4000字节
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////2.1在指定时空/App仓库里，指定对象名称查////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 data = (blob)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$data");
 datas.push(data);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

}

//示例_查询单时空单仓库的指定对象的数据_json，返回数据集列头：$id、$data，Query_mode = 92
////////////////////////////////

stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;

JSONObject data;
JSONObject[] datas;
DataSet[] returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE; //对象类型，3758，4758;

//////////////1.1在App部署时空/App仓库里，指定对象ID查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RESOURCE_JSON;//操作模式，92;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.id = (uint64)288230376154671847;
condition1.keyPaths = {"$.Customer.Address.city"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 data = (JSONObject)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$.Customer.Address.city");
 //data = (JSONObject)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$.Items[0].ProductID");
 //data = (JSONObject)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$.name");
 //data = (JSONObject)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$.addr.city");
 datas.push(data);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

 }
 }
}

# 1.4.5. Subscribe

### 1.4.5. Subscribe

# 1.4.5.1. 订阅指定对象

#### 1.4.5.1. 订阅指定对象

# 1.4.5.1.1. 订阅指定对象的删除事件（cmdCode = 21）

 1.4.5.1.1. 订阅指定对象的删除事件（cmdCode = 21） 

# 1.4.5.1.1.1. 订阅单时空的对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 17（缺省），eventTypes = {2,4,5}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

 //示例，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 17（缺省），eventTypes = {2,4,5}
////////////////////////////////

stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////

stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs;

////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

}

# 1.4.5.2. 订阅符合条件的对象

#### 1.4.5.2. 订阅符合条件的对象

# 1.4.5.2.1. 订阅符合时空条件的对象的创建、删除、移入、移出事件（cmdCode = 21）（mode=11）

//示例_订阅符合时空条件的对象的创建、删除、移入、移出事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 11，eventTypes = {1,2,4,5}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEIN);//事件类型，移入时空事件，4;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEOUT);//事件类型，移出时空事件，5;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化;
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////按App部署时空订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes; 

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按指定时空[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按数据区订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

 //示例_订阅符合时空条件的对象的创建、删除、移入、移出事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 11，eventTypes = {1,2,4,5}
////////////////////////////////

param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEIN);//事件类型，移入时空事件，4;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEOUT);//事件类型，移出时空事件，5;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化;
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////按App部署时空订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes; 

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按指定时空[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按数据区订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}
 

# 订阅符合时空条件的对象的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）（mode = 11）

//示例_订阅符合时空条件的对象的修改事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////按App部署时空订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.subFields = {"$label1","$location"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按指定时空[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.subFields = {"$label1","$location"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按数据区订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.subFields = {"$label1","$location"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RESOURCE;//对象类型，3758，4758;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////按App部署时空订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按指定时空[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.subFields = {"$label1","$location"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////按数据区订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);

# 1.4.5.3. callback

#### 1.4.5.3. callback

# 1.4.5.3.1. 对象的非修改事件的回调

//示例_对象的非修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string location,name,guid;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i 1.4.5.3.1. 对象的非修改事件的回调 
 //示例_对象的非修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string location,name,guid;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i< callback.rowLength; i++)
{
 type = callback.cellByName(i,"type");
 eventType = callback.cellByName(i,"eventType");
 location = callback.cellByName(i,"location");
 id = callback.cellByName(i,"id");
 name = callback.cellByName(i,"name");
 guid = callback.cellByName(i,"guid");
}
 

# 1.4.5.3.2. 对象的修改事件的回调

//示例_对象的修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string location,name,guid;
stringMap updateFieldValues;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i 1.4.5.3.2. 对象的修改事件的回调 
 //示例_对象的修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string location,name,guid;
stringMap<var> updateFieldValues;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i< callback.rowLength; i++)
{
 type = callback.cellByName(i,"type");
 eventType = callback.cellByName(i,"eventType");
 location = callback.cellByName(i,"location");
 id = callback.cellByName(i,"id");
 name = callback.cellByName(i,"name");
 guid = callback.cellByName(i,"guid");
 updateFieldValues = callback.cellByName(i,"updateFieldValues");
}
 

# 1.5. 数据对象

## 1.5. 数据对象

# 1.5.1. Create

### 1.5.1. Create

# 1.5.1.1. 根据拷贝创建对象

#### 1.5.1.1. 根据拷贝创建对象

# 1.5.1.1.1. 指定拷贝ID创建对象

//示例_指定拷贝ID创建对象
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

dataFields1 = {"$name","$description"};
dataFields2 = {"$name","$displayName","$description","$parentGUID"};

///////////////用App时空/App仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144","",""};//拷贝1对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy","",""};//拷贝1对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段[]名称
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第1组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

///////////////用App时空/系统仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144","",""};//拷贝1对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy","",""}; //拷贝1对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "";
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段[]名称
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第2组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

////////////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝创建对象//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"订单1","order1"}; //拷贝2对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单2","order2"}; //拷贝2对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单3","order3"}; //拷贝2对象3的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//指定仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217099;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第3组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

//////////////////////////////////
input.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//拷贝标识类型，1;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.5.1.1.1. 指定拷贝ID创建对象 
 //示例_指定拷贝ID创建对象
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap<var>[] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

dataFields1 = {"$name","$description"};
dataFields2 = {"$name","$displayName","$description","$parentGUID"};

///////////////用App时空/App仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144","",""};//拷贝1对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy","",""};//拷贝1对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段[]名称
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第1组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

///////////////用App时空/系统仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144","",""};//拷贝1对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy","",""}; //拷贝1对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "";
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段[]名称
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第2组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

////////////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝创建对象//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"订单1","order1"}; //拷贝2对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单2","order2"}; //拷贝2对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单3","order3"}; //拷贝2对象3的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//指定仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
fieldValue1.copyID = (uint64)7782220156096217099;//拷贝ID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第3组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

//////////////////////////////////
input.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//拷贝标识类型，1;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.5.1.1.2. 指定拷贝GUID创建对象

//示例_指定拷贝GUID创建对象
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

dataFields1 = {"$name","$displayName","$description"};

///////////////用App时空/App仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "5076c159-686d-4953-81a0-fcaea7c5e858";//拷贝GUID
//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第1组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

///////////////用App时空/系统仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "";
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "5076c159-686d-4953-81a0-fcaea7c5e858";//拷贝GUID
//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第2组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

////////////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝创建对象//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"订单1","order1",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单2","order2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单3","order3",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//指定仓库里
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "b4521471-79ee-4cb8-997c-729c5c3a3580";//拷贝GUID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第3组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

//////////////////////////////////
input.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5;
input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.5.1.1.2. 指定拷贝GUID创建对象 
 //示例_指定拷贝GUID创建对象
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap<var>[] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
string[] guids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

dataFields1 = {"$name","$displayName","$description"};

///////////////用App时空/App仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "5076c159-686d-4953-81a0-fcaea7c5e858";//拷贝GUID
//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第1组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

///////////////用App时空/系统仓库里的拷贝创建对象///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"物料1","MSG30","30052144"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"物料2","MSG50","ttyyy"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "";
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "5076c159-686d-4953-81a0-fcaea7c5e858";//拷贝GUID
//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第2组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

////////////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝创建对象//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"订单1","order1",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单2","order2",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"订单3","order3",""};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//指定仓库里
fieldValue1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
fieldValue1.copyGUID = "b4521471-79ee-4cb8-997c-729c5c3a3580";//拷贝GUID
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;//赋值字段名称[]
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1); //第3组拷贝和对应对象[]字段数据结构

//////////////////////////////////
input.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5;
input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 guids = output.guids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
 Trace(2, "guids[]=", guids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.5.2. Delete

### 1.5.2. Delete

# 1.5.2.1. 删除符合条件的对象（mode = 11）

//示例_删除符合条件的对象，Delete_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs, errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

////////////////按filter1过滤////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name==\"对象1\""; //过滤查找条件
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////按filter2过滤/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$description==\"aaa\""; //过滤查找条件
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_TREE;//删除模式，删自己+后代，2;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.5.2.1. 删除符合条件的对象（mode = 11）

 //示例_删除符合条件的对象，Delete_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs, errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

////////////////按filter1过滤////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name==\"对象1\""; //过滤查找条件
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////按filter2过滤/////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$description==\"aaa\""; //过滤查找条件
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_TREE;//删除模式，删自己+后代，2;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

# 1.5.2.2. 删除指定对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_删除指定对象，Delete_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

////////////////指定对象ID[]////////////////
//condition1.(int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象name[]////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
//condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name[]/////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_TREE;//删除模式，删自己+后代，2;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象别名[]////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID[]////////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1（缺省）;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.5.3. Update

### 1.5.3. Update

# 1.5.3.1. 修改指定对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_修改指定对象，Update_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

//////////////指定对象ID[]////////////////////
dataValue1 = {"descrip1",""}; //对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"",""}; //对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)2882303761546718456};
condition1.dataFields = {"$description","$parentGUID"};//赋值字段名称[]
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////指定对象name[]////////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {"","ab8f075d-5d37-4c25-b787-e40878d1cb3c"};//对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"descrip2","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};//对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$description","$spaceTimeGUID"};//赋值字段名称[];
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name[]///////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""}; //对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"727061eb-8f6a-4e3a-8343-6108f4cabf60"};//对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
//condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$parentGUID"}; //赋值字段名称[]
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象别名[]//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""}; //对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"descrip3"}; //对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$description"}; //赋值字段名称[]
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////指定对象GUID[]//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1 = {""}; //对象1的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {"descrip3"}; //对象2的字段值[]
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.dataFields = {"$description"}; //赋值字段名称[]
condition1.dataValues = new dataValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.5.4. Upgrade

### 1.5.4. Upgrade

# 1.5.4.1. 升级指定对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_升级指定对象，Upgrade_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
uint64[] ids,copyIDs;
string[] copyGUIDs1,copyGUIDs2;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

ids = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846,(uint64)288230376154671847};
copyIDs = {(uint64)7782220156096217098,(uint64)7782220156096217098,(uint64)7782220156096217099};
copyGUIDs1 = {"ab8f075d-5d37-4c25-b787-e40878d1cb3c","ab8f075d-5d37-4c25-b787-e40878d1cb3c"};
copyGUIDs2 = {"0c1a252a-44c0-4984-9576-6d5620bb1406","bb5f12f9-7966-4f44-9077-566841a86d49"};

///////////用App时空/App仓库里的拷贝升级对象，指定拷贝ID[]，指定对象ID[]////////////
//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;

//无repoGUID参数，表示repoGUID=App仓库
condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//拷贝标识类型，1;
condition1.copyIDs = copyIDs;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = ids;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////用App时空/系统仓库里的拷贝升级对象，指定拷贝GUID[]，指定对象name[]/////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;

//repoGUID=""，表示repoGUID=系统仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "";
condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5;
condition1.copyGUIDs = copyGUIDs1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝升级对象，指定拷贝GUID[]，指定对象别名[]//////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;

//指定仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5;
condition1.copyGUIDs = copyGUIDs2;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////用App时空/指定仓库里的拷贝升级对象，指定拷贝GUID[]，指定对象GUID[]/////////////
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17（缺省）;

//指定仓库
condition1.repoGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5;
condition1.copyGUIDs = copyGUIDs2;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Upgrade(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.5.5. Query

### 1.5.5. Query

# 1.5.5.1. 查询符合过滤条件的对象（mode = 11）

//示例_查询符合过滤条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询符合过滤条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.2. 查询符合模型条件的对象（mode = 12）

//示例_查询符合模型条件的对象，Query_mode = 12

stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////

int32[] errorCodes;

uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.filter = "$modelVersion==3";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID+filter过滤查////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};

if (result1.ret == 0)

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
