# 1.5.5.3. 查询多时空的对象（mode = 13）

//示例_查询多时空的对象，Query_mode = 13
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]查////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]查////////////////////

objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);

////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,object1,condition1;

////////////////////////////////

int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]查////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.4. 查询单时空的对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_查询单时空的对象，Query_mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////

int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;

uint64[] ids;

////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";

condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST; //查找模式，17;

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

////////////////////////////////

////////////////////////////////

//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST; //查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.5. 查询符合拷贝条件的对象（mode = 16）

//示例_查询符合拷贝条件的对象，Query_mode = 16
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定拷贝ID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//拷贝标识类型，1;
condition1.copyIDs = {(uint64)7782220156096221571,(uint64)7782220156096221572};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定拷贝ID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

condition1.copyIDs = {(uint64)7782220156096221571,(uint64)7782220156096221572};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.6. 按父查询子、后代对象（mode = 101）（type = 业务物、组织、岗位、单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物、时序事对象）

#### 1.5.5.6. 按父查询子、后代对象（mode = 101）（type = 业务物、组织、岗位、单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物、时序事对象）

# 1.5.5.6.1. 查询指定父对象符合过滤条件的子、后代对象（mainMode = 11）

 1.5.5.6.1. 查询指定父对象符合过滤条件的子、后代对象（mainMode = 11） 

# 1.5.5.6.1.1. 多时空的父对象[]（startCondition.mode = 13）

//示例_查询指定多时空的父对象[]符合过滤条件的子、后代对象，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 13，mainMode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3004、3007~3008、4001、4004、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象ID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象名称[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定父对象名称[]+filter过滤查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;

startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定父对象别名[]+filter过滤查////////////////////

objects.clear();
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定父对象GUID[]+filter过滤查////////////////////

objects.clear();

//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";

conditions.push(new condition1);

if (result1.ret == 0)
{

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//示例_查询指定单时空的父对象[]符合过滤条件的子、后代对象，mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17（缺省），mainMode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;

Result result1;
string[] returnFields;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3004、3007~3008、4001、4004、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.6.2. 查询指定父对象符合模型条件的子、后代对象（mainMode = 12）

 1.5.5.6.2. 查询指定父对象符合模型条件的子、后代对象（mainMode = 12） 

# 1.5.5.6.2.1. 多时空的父对象[]（startCondition.mode = 13）

//示例_查询指定多时空的父对象[]符合模型条件的子、后代对象，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 13，mainMode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3004、3007~3008、4001、4004、4008;

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象ID[]+modelID+filter过滤查////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//主查找模式，12;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象名称[]+modelGUID+filter过滤查///////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount;

 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{

}
 

# 1.5.5.6.2.2. 单时空的父对象[]（startCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_查询指定单时空的父对象[]符合模型条件的子、后代对象，mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17（缺省），mainMode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;

////////////////////////////////

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//主查找模式，12;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象名称[]+modelGUID+filter过滤查////////////////////

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//主查找模式，12;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "ee44a179-e41a-4d31-906b-70f9e3afa065";

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.7. 聚合统计

//示例_聚合统计
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,aggregate1;
stringMap [] conditions,aggregates;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::MAX;//聚合统计模式，1=最大MAX、2=最小MIN、3=平均AVERAGE、4=数量COUNT、5=求和SUM、6=极差（最大最小差）RANGE
aggregate1.field = "production";//聚合统计字段
aggregate1.asName = "maxproduction";//聚合返回字段名
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::COUNT;
aggregate1.field = "";
aggregate1.asName = "count";
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+filter过滤查，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.filter = "$modelVersion==3";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]查，聚合统计////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.5.5.7. 聚合统计

 //示例_聚合统计
////////////////////////////////

stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1,aggregate1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions,aggregates;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::MAX;//聚合统计模式，1=最大MAX、2=最小MIN、3=平均AVERAGE、4=数量COUNT、5=求和SUM、6=极差（最大最小差）RANGE
aggregate1.field = "production";//聚合统计字段
aggregate1.asName = "maxproduction";//聚合返回字段名
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::COUNT;
aggregate1.field = "";
aggregate1.asName = "count";
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+filter过滤查，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.filter = "$modelVersion==3";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]查，聚合统计////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定拷贝GUID[]+filter过滤查，聚合统计////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_COPYS;//查找模式，16;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.copyIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//拷贝标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.copyGUIDs = {"cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.5.8. 逻辑计算

//示例_逻辑计算
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,startCondition,exp1,fieldExpression,aggregate1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions,exp,aggregates;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3004、3007~3008、4001、4004、4008;

exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "2班";
exp1.linkOpera = 2;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

exp1.clear();
exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "3班";
//exp1.linkOpera = 1;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

fieldExpression.exp = new exp;
fieldExpression.realValue= "成员4";//可省，字段名称；realValue和fadeValue不能同时省略
fieldExpression.fadeValue= "成员A";//可省，字段名称，不写该字段，为假返回空；为空报错；字段需与“成员4”匹配

aggregate1.fieldExpression = new fieldExpression;
aggregate1.asName = "A班";//聚合结果字段
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象ID[]查，逻辑计算////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"A班"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.5.5.8. 逻辑计算

 //示例_逻辑计算
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,object1,startCondition,exp1,fieldExpression,aggregate1;
stringMap<var>[] objects,conditions,exp,aggregates;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3004、3007~3008、4001、4004、4008;

exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "2班";
exp1.linkOpera = 2;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

exp1.clear();
exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "3班";
//exp1.linkOpera = 1;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

fieldExpression.exp = new exp;
fieldExpression.realValue= "成员4";//可省，字段名称；realValue和fadeValue不能同时省略
fieldExpression.fadeValue= "成员A";//可省，字段名称，不写该字段，为假返回空；为空报错；字段需与“成员4”匹配

aggregate1.fieldExpression = new fieldExpression;
aggregate1.asName = "A班";//聚合结果字段
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定父对象ID[]查，逻辑计算////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"A班"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.5.6. Subscribe

### 1.5.6. Subscribe

# 1.5.6.1. 订阅指定对象

#### 1.5.6.1. 订阅指定对象

# 1.5.6.1.1. 订阅指定对象的删除事件（cmdCode = 21）

 1.5.6.1.1. 订阅指定对象的删除事件（cmdCode = 21） 

# 1.5.6.1.1.1. 订阅多时空的对象（mode = 13）

//示例_订阅指定多时空对象的删除事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 13，eventTypes = {2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名
 
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTSL;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

 1.5.6.1.1.1. 订阅多时空的对象（mode = 13） 
 //示例_订阅指定多时空对象的删除事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 13，eventTypes = {2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,object1,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap<var>[] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名
 
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;

//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;

condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;

condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}
 

# 1.5.6.1.1.2. 订阅单时空的对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 17（缺省），eventTypes = {2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;

condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;

condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

# 1.5.6.1.2. 订阅指定对象的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）

 1.5.6.1.2. 订阅指定对象的修改事件（cmdCode = 23） 

# 1.5.6.1.2.1. 订阅多时空的对象（mode = 13）

//示例_订阅指定多时空对象的修改事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 13
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m3","m4"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m5","m6"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

condition1.subFields = {"m3","m4"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m5","m6"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;

 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");

else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
