# 1.5.6.1.2.2. 订阅单时空的对象（mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_订阅指定单时空对象的修改时空事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.subFields = {"m3","m4"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
condition1.subFields = {"m5","m6"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.subFields = {"m7","m8"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;

 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");

# 1.5.6.2. 订阅符合条件的对象

#### 1.5.6.2. 订阅符合条件的对象

# 1.5.6.2.1. 订阅符合条件对象的创建、删除、移入时空、移出时空事件（cmdCode = 21）

 1.5.6.2.1. 订阅符合条件对象的创建、删除、移入时空、移出时空事件（cmdCode = 21） 

# 1.5.6.2.1.1. 订阅符合模型条件的对象（mode = 12）

//示例_订阅符合模型条件对象的创建、删除、移入时空、移出时空事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 12，eventTypes = {1,2,4,5}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEIN);//事件类型，移入时空事件，4;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEOUT);//事件类型，移出时空事件，5;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes; 

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d";
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

 //示例_订阅符合模型条件对象的创建、删除、移入时空、移出时空事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 12，eventTypes = {1,2,4,5}

//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEIN);//事件类型，移入时空事件，4;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::MOVEOUT);//事件类型，移出时空事件，5;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes; 

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d";
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}
 

# 1.5.6.2.2. 订阅符合条件对象的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）

 1.5.6.2.2. 订阅符合条件对象的修改事件（cmdCode = 23） 

# 1.5.6.2.2.1. 订阅符合模型条件的对象（mode = 12）

//示例_订阅符合模型条件对象的修改事件，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,pubConfig;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.subFields = {"m3","m4"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "cd893b2a-d036-4500-b3e8-8fcd8a76d57d";
condition1.subFields = {"m5","m6"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化

pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;

pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;

pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID订阅////////////////////
condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;

condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID订阅////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.subFields = {"m3","m4"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";

# 1.5.6.3. callback

#### 1.5.6.3. callback

# 1.5.6.3.1. 对象的非修改事件的回调

//示例_对象的非修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string spacetimeGUID,name,guid;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i 1.5.6.3.1. 对象的非修改事件的回调 
 //示例_对象的非修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string spacetimeGUID,name,guid;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i< callback.rowLength; i++)
{
 type = callback.cellByName(i,"type");
 eventType = callback.cellByName(i,"eventType");
 spacetimeGUID = callback.cellByName(i,"spacetimeGUID");
 id = callback.cellByName(i,"id");
 name = callback.cellByName(i,"name");
 guid = callback.cellByName(i,"guid");
}
 

# 1.5.6.3.2. 对象的修改事件的回调

//示例_对象的修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string spacetimeGUID,name,guid;
stringMap updateFieldValues;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i 1.5.6.3.2. 对象的修改事件的回调 
 //示例_对象的修改事件的回调
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType;
uint64 id;
string spacetimeGUID,name,guid;
stringMap<var> updateFieldValues;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i< callback.rowLength; i++)
{
 type = callback.cellByName(i,"type");
 eventType = callback.cellByName(i,"eventType");
 spacetimeGUID = callback.cellByName(i,"spacetimeGUID");
 id = callback.cellByName(i,"id");
 name = callback.cellByName(i,"name");
 guid = callback.cellByName(i,"guid");
 updateFieldValues = callback.cellByName(i,"updateFieldValues");
}
 

# 1.6. 数据记录

## 1.6. 数据记录

# 1.6.1. Create

### 1.6.1. Create

# 1.6.1.1. 创建对象的记录

#### 1.6.1.1. 创建对象的记录

# 1.6.1.1.1. 创建业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录

//示例_创建业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101、3104、3105、3108，4101、4104、4105、4108;

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","m1","m2"};
dataFields2 = {"$timeStamp","m1","m2","m3"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225119997359879,100,"aaa"};//{时间,成员1,成员2}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000000000,200,"bbb"};//2020-01-03 08:00:00
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,"aaa",(float)45.3,(bool)true};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,"bbb",(float)22.31,(bool)true};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,"ccc",(float)3.7,(bool)false};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1=ID，2=名称，4=别名，5=GUID;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.6.1.1.1. 创建业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录 
 //示例_创建业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap<var>[] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101、3104、3105、3108，4101、4104、4105、4108;

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","m1","m2"};
dataFields2 = {"$timeStamp","m1","m2","m3"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225119997359879,100,"aaa"};//{时间,成员1,成员2}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000000000,200,"bbb"};//2020-01-03 08:00:00
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,"aaa",(float)45.3,(bool)true};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,"bbb",(float)22.31,(bool)true};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,"ccc",(float)3.7,(bool)false};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1=ID，2=名称，4=别名，5=GUID;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.6.1.1.2. 创建业务事记录

//示例_创建业务事记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

dataFields1 = {"$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","m1"};
dataFields2 = {"$startTime","$endTime","$parentRecordID","m2"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000000000); //开始时间
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456); //结束时间
dataValue1.push("5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27");//父对象GUID
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113989828); //父记录ID
dataValue1.push(35); //成员1
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000012300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000456786);
dataValue1.push("5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27");
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981200);
dataValue1.push(5);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);//开始时间
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);//结束时间
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981200);//父记录ID
dataValue1.push(5); //成员2
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004415300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005459786);
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981205);
dataValue1.push(15);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004415900);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005459986);
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981208);
dataValue1.push(25);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.6.1.1.2. 创建业务事记录 
 //示例_创建业务事记录

stringMap<var> param,input,output,fieldValue1;

Result result1;

var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。

param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

dataFields1 = {"$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","m1"};
dataFields2 = {"$startTime","$endTime","$parentRecordID","m2"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////

dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456); //结束时间
dataValue1.push("5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27");//父对象GUID
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113989828); //父记录ID
dataValue1.push(35); //成员1
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000012300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000456786);
dataValue1.push("5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27");
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981200);
dataValue1.push(5);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;

fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);//开始时间
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);//结束时间
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981200);//父记录ID
dataValue1.push(5); //成员2
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004415300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005459786);
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981205);
dataValue1.push(15);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004415900);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005459986);
dataValue1.push((uint64)216172782113981208);
dataValue1.push(25);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;

//////////////////////////////////

{
 ids = output.ids;

# 1.6.1.1.3. 创建单灵敏时序物记录

//示例_创建单灵敏时序物记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","$value"};//单灵敏时序物记录的VTQ不能修改，创建记录时必须传VTQ这3个字段，且只能传VTQ这3个字段。

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000000000,192,100};//{时间,质量戳,单灵敏值}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000023456,192,200};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,192,"aaa"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,0,"bbb"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,0,"ccc"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

//fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;
input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","$value"};//单灵敏时序物记录的VTQ不能修改，创建记录时必须传VTQ这3个字段，且只能传VTQ这3个字段。

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////

fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,192,"aaa"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,0,"bbb"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,0,"ccc"};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";

//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

//////////////////////////////////

//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

# 1.6.1.1.4. 创建多灵敏时序物记录

//示例_创建多灵敏时序物记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","m1"};
dataFields2 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","m2","m3"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000000000,192,100};//{时间,质量戳,多灵敏成员1}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000023456,192,200};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,192,"aaa",34.5};//{时间,质量戳,多灵敏成员1,多灵敏成员2}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,0,"bbb",21.7};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,0,"ccc",66.4};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

 1.6.1.1.4. 创建多灵敏时序物记录 
 //示例_创建多灵敏时序物记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap<var>[] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

dataFields1 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","m1"};
dataFields2 = {"$timeStamp","$qualityStamp","m2","m3"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000000000,192,100};//{时间,质量戳,多灵敏成员1}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120000023456,192,200};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120003450000,192,"aaa",34.5};//{时间,质量戳,多灵敏成员1,多灵敏成员2}
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120023523456,0,"bbb",21.7};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);
dataValue1 = {(int64)132225120026731456,0,"ccc",66.4};
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.dataMerge = (int32)Enum_His_DataMerge::INSERT;//插入记录策略，插入，1;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}
 

# 1.6.1.1.5. 创建时序事记录

//示例_创建时序事记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
string[] dataFields1,dataFields2;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
uint64[] ids;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSTHING_RECORD;//记录类型,3107;

dataFields1 = {"$startTime","$endTime","m1","m2"};
dataFields2 = {"$startTime","$endTime","m1","m2","m3"};

///////////////对象1创建2条记录///////////////////
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000000000); //开始时间
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456); //结束时间
dataValue1.push("aa"); //成员1
dataValue1.push(35); //成员2
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值结构

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000012300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000456786);
dataValue1.push("bb");
dataValue1.push(5);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值结构

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096217098;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj1";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias1";
fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(35);
dataValue1.push("abcd");
dataValue1.push(45.76);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(100);
dataValue1.push("qwe");
dataValue1.push(23.65);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(100);
dataValue1.push("ghj");
dataValue1.push(11.66);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
//fieldValue1.objectName = "obj2";
//fieldValue1.objectAlias = "alias2";
fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields2;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
//input.dataFields = new dataFields1;//fieldValues[]里的dataFields都相同时，可设置统一的赋值字段名称[]
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 ids = output.ids;
 Trace(2, "ids[]=", ids);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

dataFields1 = {"$startTime","$endTime","m1","m2"};
dataFields2 = {"$startTime","$endTime","m1","m2","m3"};

dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456); //结束时间

dataValue1.push(35); //成员2

dataValue1.clear();

fieldValue1.objectGUID = "d3d9b56c-76b2-4fa2-9c30-f08e3e07594d";

fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields1;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

////////////////对象2创建3条记录//////////////////
dataValues.clear();
fieldValue1.clear();

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(35);
dataValue1.push("abcd");
dataValue1.push(45.76);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(100);
dataValue1.push("qwe");
dataValue1.push(23.65);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120004412300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120005456786);
dataValue1.push(100);
dataValue1.push("ghj");
dataValue1.push(11.66);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

//fieldValue1.timeScopeVersion = 0;
//fieldValue1.recordVersion = 0;

//fieldValue1.objectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;

fieldValue1.objectGUID = "e6970ec5-b622-4cf9-933e-232a0d8bdae9";

# 1.6.2. Delete

### 1.6.2. Delete

# 1.6.2.1. 删除指定对象的指定记录（mode = 51）（type = 业务事记录）

//示例_删除指定对象的指定记录，Delete_mode = 51，type = 业务事记录，3106，4106
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

///////////////指定{对象ID+记录ID[]}/////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1); //对象1的记录[]

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1); //对象2的记录[]

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定{对象name+记录ID[]}/////////////////
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981213,(uint64)216172782113981214};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983223,(uint64)216172782113983224};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定{对象别名+记录ID[]}/////////////////
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectAlias = "alias1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981215,(uint64)216172782113981216};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectAlias = "alias2";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983233,(uint64)216172782113983234};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定{对象GUID+记录ID[]}/////////////////
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "72d83c1e-43f4-437f-8967-5c460ce44805";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981215,(uint64)216172782113981216};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "0547eecb-3c85-4528-8dd4-368f47bf612c";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983233,(uint64)216172782113983234};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

///////////////指定{对象别名+记录ID[]}/////////////////

objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectAlias = "alias1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981215,(uint64)216172782113981216};

objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;

condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

///////////////指定{对象GUID+记录ID[]}/////////////////

# 1.6.2.2. 按对象条件+记录条件删除记录（mode = 61）（type = 记录）

#### 1.6.2.2. 按对象条件+记录条件删除记录（mode = 61）（type = 记录）

# 1.6.2.2.1. 删除符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 12）

//示例_删除符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录，Delete_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定模型ID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定模型GUID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

 1.6.2.2.1. 删除符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 12） 
 //示例_删除符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录，Delete_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定模型ID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定模型GUID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.2.2.2. 删除指定对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_删除指定对象指定时间范围的记录，Delete_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定对象ID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)7782220156096234521,(uint64)7782220156096234522};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象别名[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象GUID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"72d83c1e-43f4-437f-8967-5c460ce44805","0547eecb-3c85-4528-8dd4-368f47bf612c"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

 1.6.2.2.2. 删除指定对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省）） 
 //示例_删除指定对象指定时间范围的记录，Delete_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定对象ID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)7782220156096234521,(uint64)7782220156096234522};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象别名[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象GUID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"72d83c1e-43f4-437f-8967-5c460ce44805","0547eecb-3c85-4528-8dd4-368f47bf612c"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
//condition1.deleteMode = (int32)Enum_DeleteMode::DELETE_SELF;//删除模式，仅删自己，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.3. Update

### 1.6.3. Update

# 1.6.3.1. 修改指定对象的指定记录（mode = 51）（type = 业务事记录）

//示例_修改指定对象的指定记录，Update_mode = 51，type = 业务事记录，3106，4106
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output;
stringMap mulFieldValue,objectRecordFieldValue1,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecordFieldValues,conditions;
Result result1;
var[] dataValue1;
var[][] dataValues;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

///////////////指定{对象ID+记录ID[]}/////////////////
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000000000); //开始时间
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456); //结束时间
dataValue1.push(35); //成员1
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第1条记录值

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000012300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000456786);
dataValue1.push(5);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1); //第2条记录值

objectRecordFieldValue1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;//要修改的对象1的ID
objectRecordFieldValue1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212}; //要修改的2条记录的ID
objectRecordFieldValue1.dataFields = {"$startTime","$endTime","m1"};//要修改的字段
objectRecordFieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
objectRecordFieldValues.push(new objectRecordFieldValue1);
///////////////
objectRecordFieldValue1.clear();

mulFieldValue.$parentGUID = "5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27";
mulFieldValue.$parentRecordID = (uint64)216172782113981200;
objectRecordFieldValue1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;//要修改的对象2的ID
objectRecordFieldValue1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212}; //要修改的2条记录的ID
objectRecordFieldValue1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue; //修改对象22条记录的多个字段，修改为同一组值
objectRecordFieldValues.push(new objectRecordFieldValue1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectRecordFieldValues = new objectRecordFieldValues;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定{对象name+记录ID[]}/////////////////
dataValue1.clear();
dataValues.clear();
mulFieldValue.clear();
objectRecordFieldValue1.clear();
objectRecordFieldValues.clear();
condition1.clear();

dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000000000);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000023456);
dataValue1.push(35);
dataValues.push(new dataValue1);

dataValue1.clear();
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000012300);
dataValue1.push((int64)132225120000456786);

# 1.6.3.2. 按对象条件+记录条件修改记录（mode = 61）（type = 非时序记录）

#### 1.6.3.2. 按对象条件+记录条件修改记录（mode = 61）（type = 非时序记录）

# 1.6.3.2.1. 修改符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 12）

//示例_修改符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录，Update_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,mulFieldValue,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101、3104~3106、3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定模型ID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定模型GUID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////

mulFieldValue.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
