 1.6.3.2.1. 修改符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 12） 
 //示例_修改符合模型条件的对象指定时间范围的记录，Update_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,mulFieldValue,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101、3104~3106、3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定模型ID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;
//mulFieldValue.$parentGUID = "5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27";
//mulFieldValue.$parentRecordID = (uint64)216172782113981200;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定模型GUID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
mulFieldValue.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.3.2.2. 修改指定对象指定时间范围的记录（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_修改指定对象指定时间范围的记录，Update_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省）
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,mulFieldValue,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101、3104~3106、3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///////////////指定对象ID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)7782220156096234521,(uint64)7782220156096234522};

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;
//mulFieldValue.$parentGUID = "5a837b22-91f8-45fc-abcb-5a1f3fc2ab27";
//mulFieldValue.$parentRecordID = (uint64)216172782113981200;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象name[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
mulFieldValue.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象别名[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
mulFieldValue.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////////指定对象GUID[]的指定时间范围+filter记录/////////////////
objectCondition.clear();
mulFieldValue.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"f59b5d0c-8933-48d1-857f-4102d795a674","d3acf467-375e-4bc4-8b7f-cbe05ff907ed"};

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0

//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);

mulFieldValue.m1 = "aaa";
mulFieldValue.m2 = 25;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.mulFieldValue = new mulFieldValue;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.1. 查询指定对象的指定记录（type = 业务事记录）

# 1.6.4.1.1. 指定单时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 51）

//示例_查询指定单时空的对象的指定记录，Query_mode = 51，type = 业务事记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$recordID","$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","$TRGUID","m1"};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定{对象ID+记录ID[]}查////////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定{对象名称+记录ID[]}查////////////////////
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定{对象名称+记录ID[]}查////////////////////

objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";

condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectAlias = "alias1";

if (result1.ret == 0)
{

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.1.2. 指定多时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 52）

//示例_查询指定多时空的对象的指定记录，Query_mode = 52，type = 业务事记录
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,ObjectRecord1,STObjectRecordParam1,condition1;
stringMap [] ObjectRecords,STObjectRecordParams,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$recordID","$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","$TRGUID","m1"};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定{对象ID+记录ID[]}查////////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

STObjectRecordParam1.ObjectRecords = new ObjectRecords;
STObjectRecordParams.push(new STObjectRecordParam1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS;//查找模式，52;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.STObjectRecordParams = new STObjectRecordParams;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定{对象名称+记录ID[]}查////////////////////
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
STObjectRecordParam1.clear();
STObjectRecordParams.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

STObjectRecordParam1.ObjectRecords = new ObjectRecords;
STObjectRecordParams.push(new STObjectRecordParam1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS;//查找模式，52;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.STObjectRecordParams = new STObjectRecordParams;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////在指定时空[]里，指定{对象名称+记录ID[]}查//////////////////
//时空1
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
STObjectRecordParam1.clear();
STObjectRecordParams.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj1";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";

STObjectRecordParam1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
STObjectRecordParam1.ObjectRecords = new ObjectRecords;
STObjectRecordParams.push(new STObjectRecordParam1);

////////////////////
//时空2
objectRecord1.clear();

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.2. 按对象条件+记录条件查询记录（mode = 61）

#### 1.6.4.2. 按对象条件+记录条件查询记录（mode = 61）

# 1.6.4.2.1. 指定对象条件+时间范围+filter查记录（maiMode = 53（缺省））（type = 记录）

 1.6.4.2.1. 指定对象条件+时间范围+filter查记录（maiMode = 53（缺省））（type = 记录） 

# 1.6.4.2.1.1. 符合模型条件的对象的记录（objectCondition.mode = 12）

//示例_查询符合模型条件的对象的指定时间范围+filter记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12，mainMode = 53、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i, j, rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID的对象指定时间范围+filter记录///////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID+filter的对象指定时间范围+filter记录////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.2.1.2. 指定多时空的对象的记录（objectCondition.mode = 13）

//示例_查询指定多时空的对象的指定时间范围+filter记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 13，mainMode = 53、省略

int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,objectCondition,condition1;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);

objects.push(new object1);

//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

condition1.endTime = endTime;

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

objects.clear();

condition1.clear();

 //示例_查询指定多时空的对象的指定时间范围+filter记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 13，mainMode = 53、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,object1,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

/////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

/////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;

condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录/////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)18158513697557839879;

objects.push(new object1);

object1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)18158513697557835673;
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录//////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;

condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录//////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"889d913e-f8b1-4f37-b785-df727f58e148","15a6d401-3b58-4329-bb0f-c9d143b7829b"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.2.1.3. 指定单时空的对象的记录（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_查询指定单时空的对象的指定时间范围+filter记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省），mainMode = 53、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录//////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0

//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.clear();

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录//////////

objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

 //示例_查询符合模型条件的对象的单条（最早/最近）记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12，mainMode = 57
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3105、3108，4101、4104~4105、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

///////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+filter的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID+filter的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

/////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID+filter的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.2.2.2. 指定多时空的对象的单条记录（objectCondition.mode = 13）

//示例_查询多时空的对象的单条（最早/最近）记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 13，mainMode = 57
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3105、3108，4101、4104~4105、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

//////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录//////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;

condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;

objects.clear();

//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

/////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录///////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"889d913e-f8b1-4f37-b785-df727f58e148","15a6d401-3b58-4329-bb0f-c9d143b7829b"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.2.2.3. 指定单时空的对象的单条记录（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_查询单时空的对象的单条（最早/最近）记录，Query_mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省），mainMode = 57
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3105、3108，4101、4104~4105、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

/////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录///////////

//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.clear();

//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]的对象的单条（最早/最近一条）记录/////////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"889d913e-f8b1-4f37-b785-df727f58e148","15a6d401-3b58-4329-bb0f-c9d143b7829b"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.3. 按父对象查询子记录（mode = 101）（type = 业务物记录）（startCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

#### 1.6.4.3. 按父对象查询子记录（mode = 101）（type = 业务物记录）（startCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

# 1.6.4.3.1. 指定时间范围+filter（maiMode = 53（缺省））

//示例_查询指定父对象的指定时间范围+filter子记录，type = 业务物记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17，mainMode = 53、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101，4101;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象ID[]过滤//
startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象名称[]过滤//

condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 指定时空2里的父对象名称[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
startCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 数据区里的父对象别名[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
startCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 数据区里的父对象GUID[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
startCondition.guids = {"889d913e-f8b1-4f37-b785-df727f58e148","15a6d401-3b58-4329-bb0f-c9d143b7829b"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.3.2. 指定时间范围+模型（maiMode = 54）

//示例_查询指定父对象的指定模型+时间范围+filter子记录，type = 业务物记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17，mainMode = 54
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101，4101;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按模型ID+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象ID[]过滤//
startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_MODEL;//主查找模式，54;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet6";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.3.3. 指定时间范围+对象（maiMode = 55）

//示例_查询指定父对象的指定对象+时间范围+filter子记录，type = 业务物记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17，mainMode = 55
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101，4101;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按对象ID[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象ID[]过滤//
startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ObjectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按对象名称[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象名称[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};

condition1.endTime = endTime;

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按对象名称[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 指定时空2里的父对象名称[]过滤//
