conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i 1.6.4.3.3. 指定时间范围+对象（maiMode = 55） 
 //示例_查询指定父对象的指定对象+时间范围+filter子记录，type = 业务物记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17，mainMode = 55
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101，4101;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按对象ID[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象ID[]过滤//
startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ObjectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按对象名称[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = App部署时空里指定父对象名称[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按对象名称[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 指定时空2里的父对象名称[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
startCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
startCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按对象别名[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 数据区里的父对象别名[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
startCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按对象GUID[]+时间范围+filter+$parentGUID = 数据区里的父对象GUID[]过滤//
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
startCondition.guids = {"889d913e-f8b1-4f37-b785-df727f58e148","15a6d401-3b58-4329-bb0f-c9d143b7829b"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"2a4ab12f-6862-4e65-be29-b49ffbbbcbcb","ea8c14b6-7a40-456a-8263-c8a4ebe160b7"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.3.4. 单条（最早/最近）子记录（maiMode = 57）

//示例_查询指定父对象的单条（最早/最近）子记录，type = 业务物记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 17，mainMode = 57
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101，4101;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按单条（最早/最近一条）+$parentGUID = FU部署时空里指定父对象ID[]过滤//
startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORD_SINGLE;//主查找模式，57;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LAST;//单条记录类型，最早1条，1;
//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//在指定时空1[]里，查对象的记录，记录按单条（最早/最近一条）+$parentGUID = FU部署时空里指定父对象名称[]过滤//

condition1.clear();

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;

condition1.spaceTimeNames = {"group1/工厂1/车间1","group1/工厂1/车间1/line1"};

//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0

//condition1.singleType = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_SingleType::LATEST;//单条记录类型，最新1条，2;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按单条（最早/最近一条）+$parentGUID = 数据区里的父对象别名[]过滤//

//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0

 {

 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount;

 }
}
else
{

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

}
 

# 1.6.4.4. 按父对象、父记录查询子、后代记录（mode = 101）（type = 业务事记录）（startCondition.mode = 51）

#### 1.6.4.4. 按父对象、父记录查询子、后代记录（mode = 101）（type = 业务事记录）（startCondition.mode = 51）

# 1.6.4.4.1. 指定时间范围+filter（maiMode = 53（缺省））

//示例_查询指定父对象父记录的指定时间范围+filter子、后代记录，type = 业务事记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 51，mainMode = 53、省略
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$recordID","$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","$TRGUID"};//不支持返回成员

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {App部署时空里指定父对象ID+父记录ID[]}过滤//
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";

startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间

//在数据区里，查对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {数据区里指定父对象GUID+父记录ID[]}过滤//
objectRecord1.clear();
objectRecords.clear();
startCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
startCondition.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.4.2. 指定时间范围+模型（maiMode = 54）

//示例_查询指定父对象父记录的指定模型+时间范围+filter子、后代记录，type = 业务事记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 51，mainMode = 54
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$recordID","$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","$TRGUID","m1"};//支持返回属性、成员。

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查指定模型ID的对象的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {App部署时空里指定父对象ID+父记录ID[]}过滤//
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;

condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_MODEL;//主查找模式，54;

condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.4.3. 指定时间范围+对象（maiMode = 55）

//示例_查询指定父对象父记录的指定对象+时间范围+filter子、后代记录，type = 业务事记录，Query_mode = 101，startCondition.mode = 51，mainMode = 55
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,startCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string objectGUID;
string[] objectGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$recordID","$startTime","$endTime","$parentGUID","$parentRecordID","$TRGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//在App部署时空里，查指定对象ID[]的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {App部署时空里指定父对象ID+父记录ID[]}过滤//
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

startCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//startCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
startCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
startCondition.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::TREE;//查找模式，101;
condition1.startCondition = new startCondition;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//condition1.returnDistance = "==1";
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTS;//主查找模式，55;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.ObjectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称

//在指定时空1[]里，查指定对象名称[]的记录，按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {App部署时空里指定父对象名称+父记录ID[]}过滤//

//在指定时空1[]里，查指定对象名称[]的记录，记录按时间范围+filter+$parentGUID+$parentRecordID = {指定时空2里指定父对象名称+父记录ID[]}过滤//

 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 objectGUID = (string)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$objectGUID");
 objectGUIDs.push(objectGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.6.4.5. 单灵敏时序查询（type=单灵敏时序物记录）

#### 1.6.4.5. 单灵敏时序查询（type=单灵敏时序物记录）

# 1.6.4.5.1. 时刻查询（mode=161、162、163、164、165）

 1.6.4.5.1. 时刻查询（mode=161、162、163、164、165） 

# 1.6.4.5.1.1. 单对象多时刻查询（mode=161）

//示例_单对象多时刻查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 161
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1,time2,time3;
DateTime[] times;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectID = (uint64)288230376154671847;
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectName = "obj1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectName = "obj1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAlias = "alias1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUID = "76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i 1.6.4.5.1.1. 单对象多时刻查询（mode=161）

////////////////////////////////

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);

//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;

//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;

condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUID = "76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

$time $name $qualityStamp $value m1 m2
2000-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备1 -1 null aa 2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备1 192 1.5 aa 2
2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备1 0 3.5 aa 2
2021-1-2 08:00:00.000 设备1 192 4.5 aa 2
2021-1-2 10:00:00.000 设备1 0 0.5 aa 2

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.5.1.3. 多对象多时刻查询（mode=163）

//示例_多对象多时刻查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 163
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1,time2,time3;
DateTime[] times;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。

param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟

time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);

//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;

 //示例_多对象多时刻查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 163
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;

int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1,time2,time3;
DateTime[] times;
////////////////////////////////

////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.5.1.4. 多对象单时刻查询（mode=164）

//示例_多对象单时刻查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 164
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap order;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间

 //示例_多对象单时刻查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 164
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap<var> order;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
//condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 0;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 10;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//返回数据集
$time $name $qualityStamp $value m1 m2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备1 192 1.5 aa 2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备2 192 16.4 bb 40
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备3 0 3.4 cc 10
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备4 -1 null dd 50

//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TIME;//查找模式，165;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 10;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.5.2.1. 多对象指定间隔宽表查询（mode=172）

//示例_多对象指定间隔宽表查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 172
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL_WIDE;//查找模式，172;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;

//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL_WIDE;//查找模式，172;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL_WIDE;//查找模式，172;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.5.2.2. 多对象指定间隔查询（mode=173）

//示例_多对象指定间隔查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 173
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap derivedField;
stringMap [] derivedFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression = "$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName = "newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间

 //示例_多对象指定间隔查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 173
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap<var> derivedField;
stringMap<var>[] derivedFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression = "$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName = "newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVALE;//查找模式，173;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;

condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.endTime = endTime;

condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.5.2.3. 指定模型的对象指定间隔查询（mode=175）

//示例_指定模型的对象指定间隔查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 175
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;

Result result1;

stringMap derivedField;
stringMap [] derivedFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////

stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression = "$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName = "newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_INTERVAL;//查找模式，175;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_INTERVAL;//查找模式，175;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

 //示例_指定模型的对象指定间隔查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 175
////////////////////////////////

stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap<var> derivedField;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression = "$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName = "newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_INTERVAL;//查找模式，175;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;

condition1.endTime = endTime;

condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

}
