string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TREND;//查找模式，183;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TREND;//查找模式，183;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TREND;//查找模式，183;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TREND;//查找模式，183
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TREND;//查找模式，183;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$timeStamp");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

 //示例_指定模型的对象趋势查询，type = 单灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 185
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3102;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","$value","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;

//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$timeStamp");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.6. 多灵敏时序查询（type=多灵敏时序物记录）

#### 1.6.4.6. 多灵敏时序查询（type=多灵敏时序物记录）

# 1.6.4.6.1. 时刻查询（mode=161、162、163、164、165）

 1.6.4.6.1. 时刻查询（mode=161、162、163、164、165） 

# 1.6.4.6.1.1. 单对象多时刻查询（mode=161）

//示例_单对象多时刻查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 161
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1,time2,time3;
DateTime[] times;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields= {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields= {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectID = (uint64)288230376154671847;
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectName = "obj1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空里，指定对象名称+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUID = "69b87ec0-fbb9-4458-bda0-da1e66ee837f";
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectName = "obj1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;

condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAlias = "alias1";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECT_TIMES;//查找模式，161;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

condition1.objectGUID = "76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3";
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟

time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);

times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUID = "76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3";

//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//返回数据集
$time $name $qualityStamp sensm1 sensm2 m1 m2
2000-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备1 -1 null null aa 2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备1 192 1.5 true aa 2
2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备1 0 3.5 true aa 2
2021-1-2 08:00:00.000 设备1 192 4.5 false aa 2
2021-1-2 10:00:00.000 设备1 0 0.5 true aa 2
 

# 1.6.4.6.1.2. 多对象多时刻宽表查询（mode=162）

//示例_多对象多时刻宽表查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 162
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] queryFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1,time2,time3;
DateTime[] times;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

queryFields = {"m1","m2","m1","m3","m4","m3"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852,(uint64)288230376154671853};
condition1.objectFieldsCount = {2,3,1};
condition1.queryFields = new queryFields;
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2","obj3"};
condition1.objectFieldsCount = {2,3,1};
condition1.queryFields = new queryFields;
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;

if (result1.ret == 0)

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;

conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES_WIDE;//查找模式，162;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107","4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104"};

condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,-timezoneOffset);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0);
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//time2 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,35,0,0);
//time3 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,16,45,0,0);
times = {time1,time2,time3};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻[]查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIMES;//查找模式，163;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.times = new times;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//返回数据集
$time $name $qualityStamp sensm1 sensm2 m1 m2
2000-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备1 -1 null null aa 2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备1 192 1.5 true aa 2
2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备1 0 3.5 true aa 2
2021-1-2 08:00:00.000 设备1 192 4.5 false aa 2
2021-1-2 10:00:00.000 设备1 0 0.5 true aa 2

2000-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备2 -1 null null bb 40
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备2 192 16.4 false bb 40
2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备2 0 34.5 true bb 40
2021-1-2 08:00:00.000 设备2 192 43.5 true bb 40
2021-1-2 10:00:00.000 设备2 0 23.5 false bb 40
 

# 1.6.4.6.1.4. 多对象单时刻查询（mode=164）

//示例_多对象单时刻查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 164
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap order;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟

//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

//condition1.limit = 1000;

condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 0;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;

condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云

//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
//condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 0;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_TIME;//查找模式，164;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 10;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备2 192 16.4 bb 40 false

# 1.6.4.6.1.5. 指定模型的对象单时刻查询（mode=165）

//示例_指定模型的对象单时刻查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 165

stringMap param,input,output,condition1;

////////////////////////////////

DataSet[] returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

 //示例_指定模型的对象单时刻查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 165
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap<var> order;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","m1","m2"};
order.mode = (int32)Enum_OrderMode::ASC;//排序模式，1;
order.field = "$time";

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,-timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//time1 = DateTime(2025,7,22,19,15,33,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TIME;//查找模式，165;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
//condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型GUID+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TIME;//查找模式，165;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 0;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定模型GUID+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TIME;//查找模式，165;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 1000;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID+时刻查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TIME;//查找模式，165;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelGUID = "4d69b684-0d90-4b50-95a3-24372c598104";
condition1.time = time1;
//condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值模式，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
condition1.order = new order;
condition1.limit = 10;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//返回数据集
$time $name $qualityStamp sensm1 sensm2 m1 m2
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备1 192 1.5 aa 2 true
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备2 192 16.4 bb 40 false
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备3 0 3.4 cc 10 false
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备4 -1 null null 50 true

//示例_多对象指定间隔宽表查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 172
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] queryFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

queryFields = {"m1","m2","m1","m3","m4","m3"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL_WIDE;//查找模式，172;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.objectFieldsCount = {2,3,1};
condition1.queryFields = new queryFields;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;

conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.endTime = endTime;

conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

2021-1-3 08:05:00.000   3.5          56        "bb" 2 false 0
2021-1-3 08:10:00.000   3.5          100       "cc" 2 false 0
 

# 1.6.4.6.2.2. 多对象指定间隔查询（mode=173）

//示例_多对象指定间隔查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 173
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap derivedField;
stringMap [] derivedFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression = "$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName = "newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//时空对象标识类型，5;
condition1.spaceTimeGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_INTERVAL;//查找模式，173;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"76426d5d-60ec-4ad0-ae14-5a635098cad3","51278890-86d4-4f18-9dc1-83177b478107"};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$time");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//返回数据集
$time $name $qualityStamp sensm1 sensm2 newValue m1 m2
2021-1-1 00:50:00.000 设备1 -1 null null null aa 2
2021-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备1 -1 null null null aa 2

2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备1 0 3.5 true 1.75 aa 2

2021-1-1 01:40:00.000 设备1 0 0.5 true 0.25 aa 2

2021-1-1 00:50:00.000 设备2 -1 null null null bb 40
2021-1-1 01:00:00.000 设备2 -1 null null null bb 40
2021-1-1 01:10:00.000 设备2 192 16.4 false 8.2 bb 40
2021-1-1 01:20:00.000 设备2 0 34.5 true 17.25 bb 40
2021-1-1 01:30:00.000 设备2 192 43.5 true 21.75 bb 40
2021-1-1 01:40:00.000 设备2 0 23.5 false 11.75 bb 40
 

# 1.6.4.6.2.3. 指定模型的对象指定间隔查询（mode=175）

//示例_指定模型的对象指定间隔查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 175
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
stringMap derivedField;
stringMap [] derivedFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","newValue","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","sensm2","newValue","m1","m2"};

derivedField.expression="$value*0.5";
derivedField.asName="newValue";
derivedFields.push(new derivedField);

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时间范围+间隔查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_INTERVAL;//查找模式，175;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.interval = 1000;
condition1.intervalUnit = (int32)Enum_His_IntervalUnit::MS;//时间间隔单位，1;
condition1.interpolation = (int32)Enum_His_Interpolation::VALUE_BEFORE;//插值方式，1;
//condition1.derivedFields = new derivedFields;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称

//示例_多对象趋势查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 183
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);

//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;

//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.trendField = "sensm1";//趋势字段，只能是灵敏成员
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;

if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$timeStamp");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;

}

# 1.6.4.6.3.2. 指定模型的对象趋势查询（mode = 185）

//示例_指定模型的对象趋势查询，type = 多灵敏时序物记录，Query_mode = 185
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DateTime retTime;
DateTime[] retTimes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::MTSENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3103;

//$time（DateTime类型）、$timeStamp（int64类型）
returnFields = {"$time","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","m1","m2"};
//returnFields = {"$timeStamp","$name","$qualityStamp","sensm1","m1","m2"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
condition1.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096221571;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;
condition1.trendField = "sensm1";//趋势字段，只能是灵敏成员
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;

if (result1.ret == 0)
{

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;

condition1.trendField = "sensm1";//趋势字段，只能是灵敏成员

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定模型GUID+时间范围+网格数查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::MODEL_TREND;//查找模式，185;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;

condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.gridCount = 100;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_FIXITEM;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按固定项，1;
//condition1.rowOrderMode = (int32)Enum_His_RowOrderMode::BY_TIME;//每组网格的行顺序模式，按时间，2;

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 retTime = (DateTime)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$timeStamp");
 retTimes.push(retTime);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.6.4.7. 聚合统计

//示例_聚合统计
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,aggregate1;
stringMap [] conditions,aggregates;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::MAX;//聚合统计模式，1=最大MAX、2=最小MIN、3=平均AVERAGE、4=数量COUNT、5=求和SUM、6=极差（最大最小差）RANGE
aggregate1.field = "production";//聚合统计字段
aggregate1.asName = "maxproduction";//聚合返回字段名
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::COUNT;
aggregate1.field = "";
aggregate1.asName = "count";
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID的对象指定时间范围+filter记录，聚合统计///////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

#### 1.6.4.7. 聚合统计

 //示例_聚合统计
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1,aggregate1;

Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::MAX;//聚合统计模式，1=最大MAX、2=最小MIN、3=平均AVERAGE、4=数量COUNT、5=求和SUM、6=极差（最大最小差）RANGE
aggregate1.field = "production";//聚合统计字段
aggregate1.asName = "maxproduction";//聚合返回字段名
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

aggregate1.mode = (int32)Enum_Aggregate::COUNT;
aggregate1.field = "";
aggregate1.asName = "count";
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

////////////在App部署时空里，指定模型ID的对象指定时间范围+filter记录，聚合统计///////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"maxage","count"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);

# 1.6.4.8. 逻辑计算

//示例_逻辑计算
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1,exp1,fieldExpression,aggregate1;
stringMap [] conditions,exp,aggregates;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "2班";
exp1.linkOpera = 2;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

exp1.clear();
exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "3班";
//exp1.linkOpera = 1;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

fieldExpression.exp = new exp;
fieldExpression.realValue= "成员4";//可省，字段名称；realValue和fadeValue不能同时省略
fieldExpression.fadeValue= "成员A";//可省，字段名称，不写该字段，为假返回空；为空报错；字段需与“成员4”匹配

aggregate1.fieldExpression = new fieldExpression;
aggregate1.asName = "A班";//聚合结果字段
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录，逻辑计算//////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"A班"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1,exp1,fieldExpression,aggregate1;

int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////

int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;

returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$modelGUID","$timeScopeVersion","$recordVersion","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","$TRGUID","$geoGUID","m1"};

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);

//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "2班";
exp1.linkOpera = 2;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

exp1.clear();
exp1.caseName = 成员3;//条件字段
exp1.operator = 1;//逻辑运算符，1：等于；2：大于；3：小于
exp1.logicValue = "3班";
//exp1.linkOpera = 1;/*条件字段连接条件，1：与；2：或，默认为与；*/
exp.push(new exp1);

fieldExpression.exp = new exp;
fieldExpression.realValue= "成员4";//可省，字段名称；realValue和fadeValue不能同时省略
fieldExpression.fadeValue= "成员A";//可省，字段名称，不写该字段，为假返回空；为空报错；字段需与“成员4”匹配

aggregate1.fieldExpression = new fieldExpression;
aggregate1.asName = "A班";//聚合结果字段
aggregates.push(new aggregate1);

//////在指定时空里，指定对象名称[]的对象指定时间范围+filter记录，逻辑计算//////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;

objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;

//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.startTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_StartTimeRelation::ANY;//开始时间关系，0;
//condition1.endTimeRelation = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_EndTimeRelation::ANY;//结束时间关系，0;
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "m1>5";
condition1.aggregates = new aggregates;
condition1.returnFields = {"A班"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Query(param, input, output);

 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
