# 1.6.5. Subscribe

### 1.6.5. Subscribe

# 1.6.5.1. 订阅指定对象的指定记录（type = 业务事记录）

#### 1.6.5.1. 订阅指定对象的指定记录（type = 业务事记录）

# 1.6.5.1.1. 订阅指定对象指定记录的删除事件（cmdCode = 21）

 1.6.5.1.1. 订阅指定对象指定记录的删除事件（cmdCode = 21） 

# 1.6.5.1.1.1. 指定单时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 51）

//示例_订阅指定单时空的对象指定记录的删除事件，type = 业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 51，eventTypes = {2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的指定记录[]订阅////////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

 1.6.5.1.1.1. 指定单时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 51） 
 //示例_订阅指定单时空的对象指定记录的删除事件，type = 业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 51，eventTypes = {2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectRecord1,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化;
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的指定记录[]订阅////////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
ObjectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

STObjectRecordParam1.ObjectRecords = new ObjectRecords;
STObjectRecordParams.push(new STObjectRecordParam1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS;//查找模式，52;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.STObjectRecordParams = new STObjectRecordParams;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

objectRecords.clear();
STObjectRecordParam1.clear();
STObjectRecordParams.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};

objectRecord1.objectName = "obj2";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS;//查找模式，52;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;

# 1.6.5.1.2. 订阅指定对象指定记录的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）

 1.6.5.1.2. 订阅指定对象指定记录的修改事件（cmdCode = 23） 

# 1.6.5.1.2.1. 指定单时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 51）

//示例_订阅指定单时空的对象指定记录的修改事件，type = 业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 51
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectRecord1,condition1;
stringMap [] objectRecords,conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]的指定记录[]订阅////////////////////
objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234521;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.ObjectID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

objectRecords.clear();
condition1.clear();

condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;

conditions.push(new condition1);

objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "6c4159c8-2482-46c3-93d4-33808e079071";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113981211,(uint64)216172782113981212};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

objectRecord1.objectGUID = "5eda8d42-9367-49a4-b2a7-fe1106576716";
objectRecord1.recordIDs = {(uint64)216172782113983221,(uint64)216172782113983222};
objectRecords.push(new objectRecord1);

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，51;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectRecords = new objectRecords;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}
 

# 1.6.5.1.2.2. 指定多时空的对象的指定记录（mode = 52）

//示例_订阅指定多时空的对象指定记录的修改事件，type = 业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 52
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,ObjectRecord1,STObjectRecordParam1,condition1;
stringMap [] ObjectRecords,STObjectRecordParams,conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::THING_RECORD;//记录类型，3106，4106;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

# 1.6.5.2. 订阅符合条件对象的记录（mode = 64）

#### 1.6.5.2. 订阅符合条件对象的记录（mode = 64）

# 1.6.5.2.1. 订阅符合条件对象的记录的创建、删除事件（cmdCode = 21）（type = 记录）

 1.6.5.2.1. 订阅符合条件对象的记录的创建、删除事件（cmdCode = 21）（type = 记录） 

# 1.6.5.2.1.1. 符合模型条件的对象（objectCondition.mode = 12）

//示例_订阅符合模型条件的对象的记录的创建、删除事件，type = 记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 64，objectCondition.mode = 12，eventTypes = {1,2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象的记录////////

//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

 1.6.5.2.1.1. 符合模型条件的对象（objectCondition.mode = 12） 
 //示例_订阅符合模型条件的对象的记录的创建、删除事件，type = 记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 64，objectCondition.mode = 12，eventTypes = {1,2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID+filter的对象的记录///////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空[]里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象的记录/////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;

# 1.6.5.2.1.2. 多时空的对象（objectCondition.mode = 13）

//示例_订阅指定多时空对象的记录的创建、删除事件，type = 记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 13，eventTypes = {1,2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象ID[]的对象的记录////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录///////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空[]里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录/////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)18158513697557839879;
object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

object1.spaceTimeID = (uint64)18158513697557835673;
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象别名[]的对象的记录////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象GUID[]的对象的记录////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"6c4159c8-2482-46c3-93d4-33808e079071","5eda8d42-9367-49a4-b2a7-fe1106576716"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象别名[]的对象的记录////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象GUID[]的对象的记录////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"6c4159c8-2482-46c3-93d4-33808e079071","5eda8d42-9367-49a4-b2a7-fe1106576716"};
objects.push(new object1);

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}
 

# 1.6.5.2.1.3. 单时空的对象（objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省））

//示例_订阅指定单时空的对象的记录的创建、删除事件，type = 记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 21，mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 17（缺省），eventTypes = {1,2}
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int32[] eventTypes;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::CREATE);//事件类型，创建事件，1;
eventTypes.push((int32)Enum_EventType::DELETE);//事件类型，删除事件，2;

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象ID[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录///////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录/////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象别名[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象GUID[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"6c4159c8-2482-46c3-93d4-33808e079071","5eda8d42-9367-49a4-b2a7-fe1106576716"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_EVENTTYPE;//订阅命令码，21;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.eventTypes = new eventTypes;

condition1.subscribeName = "subs5";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;

# 1.6.5.2.2. 订阅符合条件对象的记录的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）（type = 业务物、组织、岗位、人员、业务事记录）

 1.6.5.2.2. 订阅符合条件对象的记录的修改事件（cmdCode = 23）（type = 业务物、组织、岗位、人员、业务事记录） 

# 1.6.5.2.2.1. 符合模型条件的对象（objectCondition.mode = 12）

//示例_订阅符合模型条件的对象的记录的修改事件，type = 业务物、组织、岗位、人员、业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID+filter的对象的记录///////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空[]里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象的记录/////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象指的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);
//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;

 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);

 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);

 1.6.5.2.2.1. 符合模型条件的对象（objectCondition.mode = 12） 
 //示例_订阅符合模型条件的对象的记录的修改事件，type = 业务物、组织、岗位、人员、业务事记录，Subscribe_cmdCode = 23，mode = 61，objectCondition.mode = 12
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs;
//uint32[] subscribeIDs;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定模型ID+filter的对象的记录///////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//模型标识类型，1;
objectCondition.modelID = (uint64)7782220156096234522;
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空[]里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象的记录/////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;

objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定模型GUID+filter的对象指的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);
//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;

 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS;//查找模式，13;

objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.objects = new objects;

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;

condition1.clear();

//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME; //对象标识类型，2（缺省）;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;

condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;

condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象GUID[]的对象的记录////////

objects.clear();

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);

//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101~3108，4101、4104~4106、4108;
param.callBackFuncName = "callBackFunc1";//回调函数名

pubConfig.pubMode = (int32)Enum_PubMode::PUSH;//发布模式，0;
pubConfig.cachePersist = (bool)false; //发布缓存是否持久化
pubConfig.qos = (int32)Enum_QOS::AT_LEAST_ONCE;//质量等级，至少1次，1;
pubConfig.cacheEvictPolicy = (int32)Enum_PubCacheEvictPolicy::FIFO;//发布缓存淘汰策略，先进先出，0;
pubConfig.batchMaxSize = 100;
pubConfig.cacheMaxSize = 2000;
pubConfig.cycle = 2000;
pubConfig.timeout = 30000;

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象ID[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST; //查找模式，17;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID; //对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs1";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在App部署时空里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录///////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
//objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj1","obj2"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs2";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

///////在指定时空里，订阅指定对象名称[]的对象的记录/////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeID = (uint64)3458764513820540929;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
objectCondition.names = {"obj3","obj4"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs3";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象别名[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
objectCondition.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////在数据区里，订阅指定对象GUID[]的对象的记录////////
objectCondition.clear();
condition1.clear();

objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_SINGLEST;//查找模式，17;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
objectCondition.identifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
objectCondition.guids = {"6c4159c8-2482-46c3-93d4-33808e079071","5eda8d42-9367-49a4-b2a7-fe1106576716"};

condition1.cmdCode = (int32)Enum_SubscribeCmdCode::SUB_FIELDCHANGE;//订阅命令码，23;
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_OBJECTCONDITION;//查找模式，64;
condition1.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
condition1.subFields = {"m1","m2"};

condition1.subscribeName = "subs4";
//condition1.pubConfig = new pubConfig;
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Subscribe(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 //subscribeIDs = output.subscribeIDs;
 //Trace(2, "subscribeIDs=", subscribeIDs);
 Trace(2, "Subscribe=", "success");
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
}

# 1.6.5.3. callback

#### 1.6.5.3. callback

# 1.6.5.3.1. 记录的非修改事件的回调（type=业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录）

//示例_记录的非修改事件的回调，type=业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType,timeScopeVersion,recordVersion;
uint64 objectID;
int64 timeStamp;
string spacetimeGUID,objectName,objectGUID;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i 1.6.5.3.1. 记录的非修改事件的回调（type=业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录） 
 //示例_记录的非修改事件的回调，type=业务物、组织、岗位、人员记录
//Callback(Dataset callback)
////////////////////////////////
int32 i,type,eventType,timeScopeVersion,recordVersion;
uint64 objectID;
int64 timeStamp;
string spacetimeGUID,objectName,objectGUID;
///////////////////////////////
//Trace(2,"callback=",callback);
for (i=1; i< callback.rowLength; i++)
{
 type = callback.cellByName(i,"type");
 eventType = callback.cellByName(i,"eventType");
 spacetimeGUID = callback.cellByName(i,"spacetimeGUID");
 objectID = callback.cellByName(i,"objectID");
 objectName = callback.cellByName(i,"objectName");
 objectGUID = callback.cellByName(i,"objectGUID");
 timeScopeVersion = callback.cellByName(i,"timeScopeVersion");
 recordVersion = callback.cellByName(i,"recordVersion");
 timeStamp = callback.cellByName(i,"timeStamp");
}

# 1.7. 列表对象

## 1.7. 列表对象

# 1.7.1. 组织岗位

### 1.7.1. 组织岗位

# 1.7.1.1. Create

//示例_给指定人员的指定记录的组织岗位列表添加组织岗位
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime time1;
////////////////////////////////

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟

fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

# 1.7.1.2. Delete

//示例_更新指定人员对象指定时间范围的记录的组织岗位列表属性，将按filter过滤的组织岗位移除
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ORGPOST;//列表对象类型，3213、4213;

timezoneOffset = GetLocalTimezoneOffset();//本地时区偏移，480=8*60分钟
//输出时间=源时间+timezoneOffset(分钟)，timezoneOffset省略：系统自动计算timezoneOffset=（本地时区-格林威治时区）*60分钟
startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,-timezoneOffset);//本地时间转成格林威治时区时间
endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,-timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,timezoneOffset);//格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,timezoneOffset);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0);//timezoneOffset省略，格林威治时区时间转成本地时间
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0);
//startTime = DateTime(2025,10,28,16,00,0,0,0);//timezoneOffset=0，不转
//endTime = DateTime(2025,10,29,16,50,0,0,0);

///在App部署时空，更新指定对象ID[]+时间范围的记录的组织岗位列表属性，将按filter过滤的组织岗位移除//
//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::PERSON_RECORD;//人员记录，3105,4105;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.endTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,9,0,0,0,0);
condition1.filter = ""; //移除所有
conditions.push(new condition1);

///在App部署时空，更新指定对象Name[]+时间范围的记录的组织岗位列表属性，将按filter过滤的组织岗位移除//
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::PERSON_RECORD;//人员记录，3105,4105;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
condition1.filter = "$orgGUID == \"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d\"";//按过滤移除
conditions.push(new condition1);

///在App部署时空，更新指定对象别名[]+时间范围的记录的组织岗位列表属性，将按filter过滤的组织岗位移除//
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::PERSON_RECORD;//人员记录，3105,4105;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
//condition1.filter = "$postGUID == \"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d\"";
conditions.push(new condition1);

///在App部署时空，更新指定对象GUID[]+时间范围的记录的组织岗位列表属性，将按filter过滤的组织岗位移除//
condition1.clear();

//condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::PERSON_RECORD;//人员记录，3105,4105;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectGUIDs = {"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
//condition1.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//condition1.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
condition1.startTime = startTime;
condition1.endTime = endTime;
//condition1.filter = "$postGUID == \"c3ab4641-b563-4be6-8d2a-2a33bc25334d\"";
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.7.1.3. Query

//示例_查询指定多时空的人员对象的指定时间范围的组织岗位列表
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,objectCondition,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
int16 timezoneOffset;
DateTime startTime,endTime;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;

 orgGUIDs.push(orgGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.7.2.1. Create

#### 1.7.2.1. Create

# 1.7.2.1.1. param.type = 普通索引_运行模型

//示例_给指定运行模型添加索引
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,fieldValue1;
stringMap [] fieldValues;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_MODEL;//列表对象类型，3201、4201;

/////////在App部署时空，给指定模型添加索引/////////
fieldValue1.modelID = (uint64)288230376154671847;
//fieldValue1.modelGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";
fieldValue1.memberNames = {"m1","m2"};
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);
 
//////////////////////////////////
input.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//运行模型类型，3901~3907,4901,4904~4906,4911;
input.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//input.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";

//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2;

//fieldValue1.objectGUID = "392aa455-d91b-4144-b11d-83c4a2691a56";
fieldValue1.dataFields = new dataFields;
fieldValue1.dataValues = new dataValues;
fieldValues.push(new fieldValue1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
input.fieldValues = new fieldValues;

result1 = Create(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
}

input.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;

# 1.7.2.2. Delete

#### 1.7.2.2. Delete

# 1.7.2.2.1. param.type = 普通索引_运行模型（mode = 1）

//示例_删除普通索引_运行模型，Delete_mode = 1
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_MODEL;//列表对象类型，3201、4201;

////////////////指定关联模型////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//运行模型类型，3901~3907,4901,4904~4906,4911;
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.modelGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
//condition1.filter = "$memberName==\"m1\"";
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.7.2.2.2. param.type = 普通索引_数据对象、唯一索引__数据对象、外键、时间范围版本、记录版本（mode = 1）

//示例_删除普通索引_数据对象、唯一索引_数据对象、外键、时间范围版本、记录版本，Delete_mode = 1
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_OBJECT;//列表对象类型，3202、4202;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_UNIQUE_OBJECT;//列表对象类型，3203、4203;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::FOREIGNKEY;//列表对象类型，3211、4211;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TIMESCOPEVERSION;//列表对象类型，3212、4212;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RECORDVERSION;//列表对象类型，3210、4210;

////////////////指定关联对象////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
//condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.objectGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
//condition1.filter = "$memberName==\"m1\"";//type=普通索引_数据对象
//condition1.filter = "$indexName==\"index1\"";//type=唯一索引_数据对象
//condition1.filter = "$foreignField==\"m2\"";//type=外键
//condition1.filter = "$name==\"版本2\"";//type=时间范围版本、记录版本
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.7.2.3. Update

#### 1.7.2.3. Update

# 1.7.2.3.1. param.type = 时间范围版本、记录版本（mode = 4）

//示例_修改时间范围版本、记录版本，Update_mode = 4
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TIMESCOPEVERSION;//列表对象类型，3212、4212;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RECORDVERSION;//列表对象类型，3210、4210;

////////////////////////////////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_MUL_RELATING;//查找模式，4;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::(int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objectIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.objectNames = {"obj1","obj2"};
//condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.objectGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
condition1.filter = "$id==1";
condition1.$name = "v1";
condition1.$publish = true;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。

condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::(int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
//condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
