//condition1.objectAliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
//condition1.objectGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
condition1.filter = "$id==1";
condition1.$name = "v1";
condition1.$publish = true;
conditions.push(new condition1);

////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Update(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.7.2.4. Query

#### 1.7.2.4. Query

# 1.7.2.4.1. param.type = 普通索引_运行模型（mode = 1）

//示例_查询普通索引_运行模型，Query_mode = 1
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string modelGUID;
string[] modelGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_MODEL;//列表对象类型，3201、4201;

returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$modelGUID","$memberName"};

////////////////////////////////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//运行模型类型，;3901~3907,4901,4904~4906,4911
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.modelGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
//condition1.filter = "$alias==\"alias1\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i 1.7.2.4.1. param.type = 普通索引_运行模型（mode = 1） 
 //示例_查询普通索引_运行模型，Query_mode = 1
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
string modelGUID;
string[] modelGUIDs;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_MODEL;//列表对象类型，3201、4201;

returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$modelGUID","$memberName"};

////////////////////////////////////////////////
condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_MODEL;//运行模型类型，;3901~3907,4901,4904~4906,4911
condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
//condition1.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5（缺省）;
condition1.modelIDs = {(uint64)288230376154671845,(uint64)288230376154671846};
//condition1.modelGUIDs = {"256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f","c602c674-220a-4bc8-be34-7f51d4a27087"};
//condition1.filter = "$alias==\"alias1\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 modelGUID = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$modelGUID");
 modelGUIDs.push(modelGUID);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.7.2.4.2. param.type = 普通索引_数据对象、唯一索引__数据对象、外键、时间范围版本、记录版本（mode = 1）

//示例_查询普通索引_普通索引_数据对象、唯一索引_数据对象、外键、时间范围版本、记录版本，Query_mode = 1
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,object1,condition1;
stringMap [] objects,conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength,belongDataType;
int32[] belongDataTypes;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_OBJECT;//列表对象类型，3202、4202;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::INDEX_UNIQUE_OBJECT;//列表对象类型，3203、4203;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::FOREIGNKEY;//列表对象类型，3211、4211;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::TIMESCOPEVERSION;//列表对象类型，3212、4212;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::RECORDVERSION;//列表对象类型，3210、4210;

returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$objectGUID","$memberName"};
//returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$objectGUID","$indexName","$mulMemberName"};
//returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$objectGUID","$foreignField","$referenceType","$referenceGUID","$referenceField"};
//returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$objectID","$id","$name","$startTime","$endTime","$publish"};
//returnFields = {"$belongDataType","$objectID","$timeScopeVersion","$id","$name","$publish"};

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象ID[]查////////////////////
object1.ids = {(uint64)288230376154671847,(uint64)288230376154671852};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//对象标识类型，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.names = {"obj1","obj2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里，指定对象名称[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂1车间1";
object1.names = {"obj3","obj4"};
objects.push(new object1);
object1.spaceTimeName = "工厂2车间1产线1";
object1.names = {"obj5","obj6"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//时空对象标识类型，2;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::NAME;//对象标识类型，2（缺省）;
condition1.duplicationDealMode = (int32)Enum_DuplicationDealMode::RETURN_ALL;//重名处理模式，1;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象别名[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.aliases = {"alias1","alias2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ALIAS;//对象标识类型，4;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里，指定对象GUID[]查////////////////////
object1.clear();
objects.clear();
condition1.clear();

object1.guids = {"4e8cb4bc-cb38-4f66-a5fa-d460efe3fbc5","1a1d3ef3-cb9c-4d5d-bd50-4fedab770cf2"};
objects.push(new object1);

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::STRUCTURES_BY_RELATING;//查找模式，1;
condition1.belongDataType = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
condition1.objectIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//对象标识类型，5;
condition1.objects = new objects;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet5";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);

{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 belongDataType = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$belongDataType");
 belongDataTypes.push(belongDataType);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

//示例_删除数据集

stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////

stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET;//数据集，3301，4301;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET_DBS;//跨库数据集，18301;

condition1.dataSetNames = {"ds1","ds2"};
conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Delete(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret != 0)
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}

# 1.8.1.2. Query

//示例_查询数据集
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////

stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;

uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;

cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET;//数据集，3301，4301;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET_DBS;//跨库数据集，18301;

condition1.dataSetName = "ds1";
condition1.offset = 1; //1001、2001、3001、4001;
condition1.limit = 1000;//若数据集总行数totalCount=5000，每次最多返回1000行，则需分5次，获取全部数据
conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_查询数据集
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap<var>[] conditions;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.areaID = 0; //数据区ID，0：默认数据区。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。
param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET;//数据集，3301，4301;
//param.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::DATASET_DBS;//跨库数据集，18301;

condition1.dataSetName = "ds1";
condition1.offset = 1; //1001、2001、3001、4001;
condition1.limit = 1000;//若数据集总行数totalCount=5000，每次最多返回1000行，则需分5次，获取全部数据
conditions.push(new condition1);

input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = Query(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);

}

# 1.9. 高级查询

## 1.9. 高级查询

# 1.9.1. QueryJoin

### 1.9.1. QueryJoin

# 1.9.1.1. cmdKind=1

//示例_连接查询，cmdKind=1，joins[]可为不同子系统不同数据区的，返回一个数据集。
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,join1,join2,objectCondition;
stringMap [] conditions,joins;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。

//////////////连接1////////////////////
join1.areaID = 0;
join1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

join1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//join1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//join1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//join1.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::RIGHT; //连接模式，3;
//join1.joinCondition = "";
join1.returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};
join1.asName = "OBJ";
joins.push(new join1);

//////////////连接2////////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

join2.areaID = 0;
join2.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101;

join2.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
join2.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
join2.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//join2.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//join2.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
join2.startTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,7,0,0,0,0);
join2.endTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,9,0,0,0,0);
join2.filter = "m1>5";
join2.returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","m1"};
join2.asName = "RECORD";
join2.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::LEFT; //连接模式，2;
join2.joinCondition = "RECORD.$parentGUID == OBJ.$guid";
joins.push(new join2);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdKind = 1;
input.joins = new joins;
input.returnFields = {"OBJ.$id","OBJ.$name","RECORD.$objectGUID","RECORD.$timeStamp","RECORD.$spaceTimeGUID","RECORD.$parentGUID","RECORD.m1"};
//input.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//input.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//input.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称

result1 = QueryJoin(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_连接查询，cmdKind=1，joins[]可为不同子系统不同数据区的，返回一个数据集。
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1,join1,join2,objectCondition;
stringMap<var>[] conditions,joins;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。

//////////////连接1////////////////////
join1.areaID = 0;
join1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

join1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//join1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//join1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//join1.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::RIGHT; //连接模式，3;
//join1.joinCondition = "";
join1.returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};
join1.asName = "OBJ";
joins.push(new join1);

//////////////连接2////////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

join2.areaID = 0;
join2.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101;

join2.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
join2.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
join2.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//join2.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//join2.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
join2.startTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,7,0,0,0,0);
join2.endTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,9,0,0,0,0);
join2.filter = "m1>5";
join2.returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","m1"};
join2.asName = "RECORD";
join2.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::LEFT; //连接模式，2;
join2.joinCondition = "RECORD.$parentGUID == OBJ.$guid";
joins.push(new join2);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdKind = 1;
input.joins = new joins;
input.returnFields = {"OBJ.$id","OBJ.$name","RECORD.$objectGUID","RECORD.$timeStamp","RECORD.$spaceTimeGUID","RECORD.$parentGUID","RECORD.m1"};
//input.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//input.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//input.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称

result1 = QueryJoin(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.9.1.2. cmdKind=2

//示例_连接查询，cmdKind=2，多conditions，每个condition的joins[]必须是同一个子系统，返回多个数据集
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1,join1,join2,objectCondition;
stringMap [] conditions,joins;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。

//////////////连接1////////////////////
join1.areaID = 0;
join1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

join1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//join1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//join1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//join1.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::RIGHT; //连接模式，3;
//join1.joinCondition = "";
join1.returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};
join1.asName = "OBJ";
joins.push(new join1);

//////////////连接2////////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

join2.areaID = 0;
join2.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101;

join2.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
join2.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
join2.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//join2.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//join2.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
join2.startTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,7,0,0,0,0);
join2.endTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,9,0,0,0,0);
join2.filter = "m1>5";
join2.returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","m1"};
join2.asName = "RECORD";
join2.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::LEFT; //连接模式，2;
join2.joinCondition = "RECORD.$parentGUID == OBJ.$guid";
joins.push(new join2);

//////////////////////////////////
condition1.joins = new joins;
condition1.returnFields = {"OBJ.$id","OBJ.$name","RECORD.$objectGUID","RECORD.$timeStamp","RECORD.$spaceTimeGUID","RECORD.$parentGUID","RECORD.m1"};
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdKind = 2;
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = QueryJoin(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_连接查询，cmdKind=2，多conditions，每个condition的joins[]必须是同一个子系统，返回多个数据集
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap<var> param,input,output,condition1,join1,join2,objectCondition;
stringMap<var>[] conditions,joins;
Result result1;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap<var>[] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。

//////////////连接1////////////////////
join1.areaID = 0;
join1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

join1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//join1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//join1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
//join1.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::RIGHT; //连接模式，3;
//join1.joinCondition = "";
join1.returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};
join1.asName = "OBJ";
joins.push(new join1);

//////////////连接2////////////////////
objectCondition.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_BY_MODEL;//查找模式，12;
objectCondition.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
objectCondition.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)3458764513820540754};
objectCondition.modelIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::GUID;//模型标识类型，5（缺省）;
objectCondition.modelGUID = "256664bc-4bc5-44fe-80d2-155c7020b81f";
objectCondition.filter = "$modelVersion==3";

join2.areaID = 0;
join2.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY_RECORD;//记录类型，3101;

join2.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::RECORDS_BY_CONDITION;//查找模式，61;
join2.objectCondition = new objectCondition;
join2.mainMode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_MainMode::RECORDS_ALL;//主查找模式，53;
//join2.timeScopeVersion = 0; //时间范围版本，默认版本=0
//join2.recordVersion = 0; //记录版本，默认版本=0
join2.startTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,7,0,0,0,0);
join2.endTime = DateTime(2023,1,1,9,0,0,0,0);
join2.filter = "m1>5";
join2.returnFields = {"$objectGUID","$timeStamp","$spaceTimeGUID","$parentGUID","m1"};
join2.asName = "RECORD";
join2.joinMode = (int32)Enum_JoinMode::LEFT; //连接模式，2;
join2.joinCondition = "RECORD.$parentGUID == OBJ.$guid";
joins.push(new join2);

//////////////////////////////////
condition1.joins = new joins;
condition1.returnFields = {"OBJ.$id","OBJ.$name","RECORD.$objectGUID","RECORD.$timeStamp","RECORD.$spaceTimeGUID","RECORD.$parentGUID","RECORD.m1"};
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.cmdKind = 2;
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = QueryJoin(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i <= returnDatas.length; i++)
 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
 //returnMode=1（缺省），返回全部数据模式，returnData的列和returnFields里的字段对应
 for (j=1; j <= rowLength; j++)
 {
 id = (uint64)returnDatas[i].cellByName(j,"$id");
 ids.push(id);
 }
 //returnMode=2，游标模式，返回数据集总行数，returnData的列：int32 totalCount; 
 //totalCount = (int32)returnDatas[i].cellByName(1,"totalCount");
 //再用数据集句柄dataSetName分页查询数据集数据，Query(type=数据集)，参见句柄\数据集章节
 }
}
else
{
 Trace(2, "result1.ret=", result1.ret);
 //errorCodes = output.errorCodes;
 //errorCodeExs = output.errorCodeExs;
 //errorInfos = output.errorInfos;
 //Trace(2, "errorCodes=", errorCodes);
 //Trace(2, "errorCodeExs=", errorCodeExs);
 //Trace(2, "errorInfos=", errorInfos);
}
 

# 1.9.2. QueryMix

//示例_混合查询符合过滤条件的对象，Query_mode = 11
////////////////////////////////
int32 cloudID;
stringMap param,input,output,condition1;
stringMap [] conditions;
Result result1;
string[] returnFields;
////////////////////////////////
int32 totalCount;
int32[] errorCodes;
stringMap [] errorCodeExs,errorInfos;
int32 i,j,rowLength;
uint64 id;
uint64[] ids;
DataSet[] returnDatas;
////////////////////////////////
cloudID = 0; //0：访问本App的云
//cloudID = getLocalCloudID(); //获取本App的云ID
//cloudID = 3; //指定访问的云ID
param.cloudID = cloudID; //访问云ID，省略、0：访问本App的云。
param.transactionID = (uint64)0; //事务ID，省略、0：无事务。
param.timeout = 3000; //超时时间（ms），省略：默认10000ms。

returnFields = {"$id","$guid","$name","$displayName","$description","$modelGUID","$modelVersion","$copyGUID","$spaceTimeGUID"};//只有单灵敏时序物、多灵敏时序物对象，returnfield支持返回非灵敏成员，其它类型对象，都不支持返回成员。

//////////////在App部署时空里查所有////////////////////
condition1.areaID = 0;
condition1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet1";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在App部署时空里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.areaID = 0;
condition1.type = (int32)Enum_Plan_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
//condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::APPST;//时空选择模式，App时空，1;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.areaID = 0;
condition1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIdentifierType = (int32)Enum_IdentifierType::ID;//时空对象标识类型，1;
condition1.spaceTimeIDs = {(uint64)3458764513820540929,(uint64)18158513697557839874};
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet3";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在数据区里按filter过滤查////////////////////
condition1.clear();

condition1.areaID = 0;
condition1.type = (int32)Enum_Plan_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ALLST;//时空选择模式，数据区，3;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;
condition1.filter = "$name == \"物料A\"";
condition1.returnFields = new returnFields;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_DATA;//1（缺省）：返回完整数据模式;
//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet4";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////////////////////////
input.conditions = new conditions;

result1 = QueryMix(param, input, output);
//Trace(2, "result1=", result1);
//Trace(2, "input=", input);
//Trace(2, "output=", output);
if (result1.ret == 0)
{
 returnDatas = output.returnDatas;
 Trace(2, "returnDatas=", returnDatas);
 for (i = 1; i //示例_混合查询符合过滤条件的对象，Query_mode = 11

//condition1.returnMode = (int32)Enum_ReturnMode::RETURN_HANDLE;//2：返回句柄，游标分页查询模式;
//condition1.dataSetName = "dataSet2";//数据集句柄名称
conditions.push(new condition1);

//////////////在指定时空[]里按filter过滤查////////////////////

condition1.type = (int32)Enum_His_Type::ENTITY;//对象类型，3001~3008、4001、4004~4006、4008;

condition1.mode = (int32)Enum_HisPlan_Mode::OBJECTS_ALL;//查找模式，11;
condition1.spaceTimeMode = (int32)Enum_SpaceTimeMode::ASSIGNST;//时空选择模式，指定时空，2;
//condition1.spaceTimeScope = (int32)ENUM_spaceTimeScope::SELF;//时空范围类型，本身，1;

{

 {
 rowLength = returnDatas[i].rowLength;
